programme.sub-title: 2026 Miami Grand Prix Sprint and Qualifying Highlights
programme.desc: Lee McKenzie and Alice Powell present action from the second sprint race of the season and the battle for grid positions in the fourth round of the campaign at Miami International Autodrome

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.sub-title: 2026 Miami Grand Prix Sprint Qualifying Highlights
programme.desc: Alex Jacques presents action from Miami International Autodrome in Florida, where the drivers battled for grid positions ahead of the sprint race at the fourth round of the season

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCools, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzios two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett heads to the Austro-German border with his guest vacationer Roisin Conaty, spending a couple of days in the fairy-tale city of Salzburg. After checking in to the art-filled Blaue Ganz hotel, they hop into a horse and carriage for a tour of the city and an on-the-go three-course meal. They then embark on a forest-bathing workshop, attempting a series of exercises to reawaken their senses. Day two starts with a homage to Mozart. The duo reflect on the composers music then sample the citys signature sweet, Mozartkulgen - aka Mozart Balls - a mix of nougat, marzipan and dark chocolate

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In north London, Helen and her Albanian boyfriend David kick off the contest with their Greek menu. Their food goes down well with Sara and her Aussie husband Thierry, which is more than can be said for Davids views on womens roles within the home. On day two, Vicky and Geoff cook up an Italian menu, but their rock and pop idol dress code is a huge flop with one couple. The hosts face a grilling over food shortcuts, and Helen and Vicky go head to head in the battle of the cheesecakes. Finally, Sara and Thierry serve up the fashions and food of the 1980s. However, one guest makes a fashion faux pas about Saras favourite frock

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Wendi Peters and Ricky Groves go head to head as they take on lint roller printing, while Sharron Davies and Tanni Grey-Thompson have a slogan banner craft-off

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Whod a Thought It in Grafty Green, Kent, where partners Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin hope to impress their fellow guests. On arrival, Liz and Brian are excited over their two hot tubs, and Jackie and Paul are more than happy with the complimentary champagne. However, Matthew and Liam are underwhelmed by the cleanliness levels

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the New Osborne Hotel in Blackpool on their second night, where proprietor Matthew Bracegirdle and entertainment manager Liam hope their guests feel at home in their family friendly establishment. However, Jackie and Paul are unimpressed by their small room, and Joe and Alex find the cleanliness levels lacking

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Fairy Falls Hotel in Trefriw, Conwy County Borough, where BandB newcomers Jackie and Paul Langshaw hope to impress the other contestants. They take their guests to a local maze in the afternoon and, after an uncomfortable nights sleep for Alex, some of the breakfast orders are misplaced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Husband and wife Liz and Brian Jardine welcome their guests to The Great Trewern BandB, Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where they enjoy the quiet life. Joe and Alex feel far away from it all, but the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress the other guests. At dinner, talk turns to first impressions and it appears it is all water under the bridge for Jackie and Joe, but she remains upset with the feedback Matthew and Liam gave her

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet one final time to find out what they have been paid. Joe Mallett and Alex Rea Baldwin kick things off by confronting Matthew Bracegirdle and Liam Halewood about their comments regarding the cleanliness of their establishment, and Jackie and Paul Langshaw complain about their poor breakfast score

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug asks his father for financial aid to help deal with the mould problem in his house. When he receives some paternal advice on saving for a rainy day, he starts to wonder where all his money goes - and decides Carries wild spending is the problem. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The Russian workers are plied with an unending supply of vodka as Doug and Carrie encourage them to repair their house. American comedy, starring Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug stretches the truth to avoid going to the opera and admits to Carrie that he lies on a regular basis for the sake of an easy life. American comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.desc: Debra spends a whole day cooking with Marie in an effort to get along with her mother-in-law, while Ray reluctantly agrees to take Robert and Frank to a car show

programme.desc: Ray is disturbed to learn Michael may be held back a year at school, and fears the youngster has inherited his academic ineptitude. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Sullivan Sweeten

programme.desc: Ray and Debra have very different opinions on how to react to the news that Ally has been bullying another child on the school bus. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.desc: Daphne helps Frasier make up his mind whether he should sneak an on-air endorsement for a Chinese restaurant into his radio show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.desc: Bulldog overhears Frasier saying he is about to be sacked and quits his job at the radio station before the axe falls. Comedy, starring Dan Butler and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The sudden death of Martins seemingly healthy doctor gives Frasier an unpleasant reminder of his own mortality. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns sets out to be reunited with his beloved teddy bear, which he lost as a child. Unfortunately, it is now owned by Maggie, presenting Homer with an unenviable dilemma. Featuring the voices of the Ramones

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart lands a job as assistant to his idol Krusty the Clown and even gets to say his own catchphrase in front of the cameras, winning instant celebrity status. Featuring the guest voice of TV host Conan OBrien

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Professional singer Barry and hairdresser Angela, who live in Gloucestershire, are planning to relocate to the area around Benidorm. Jasmine Harman lines up five options for their budget of £225,000, hoping that at least one will tempt them into making an offer

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first venue of the week is Sawcliffe Manor in High Risby, Lincolnshire. An afternoon at the onsite spa leaves the guests relaxed, but a lack of vegan breakfast stirs up trouble

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Charlotte and Donnas Rooms at the Inn, in Retford. Things get off to a rough start when Rob discovers some dusty furniture in his room, but a visit to a recreation of a Native American camp shakes things up. At feedback time, the hosts are left with earache over complaints about night-time noises

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers visit Robs Wolds Wine Estate n Nottinghamshire, which features glamping pods in the middle of a vineyard. Everyone is happy at the wine tasting but a surprise chicken invasion at breakfast leaves Robs guests less than impressed and his confidence is knocked when he receives some unpleasant cleanliness comments in his feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners visit Dovestone Holiday Park in Saddleworth, Greater Manchester, where host Karlie hopes her lavish lodges and glorious views will be a winning combination. Things get off to a sizzling start with the BandBers heralding the hot tubs, but not everyone is onboard with a group meditation session in the afternoon. The local produce at breakfast goes down a storm - but one pair moaning about their mattress makes for a less-than comfortable experience for Karlie come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. There are bust-ups about breakfast options, ding-dongs over decor and grumblings about gravy-scented wine. After the dust has settled, all participants learn the identity of the winner

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters who battled the property markets either side of the Thames. In 2018, Emily and Dustin had saved a healthy deposit, but in the north London market, they were finding it hard to secure their first home. In 2009, it was all about location for Sarah and Ian. Fixated on their beloved Balham, but without the budget for two bedrooms, Phil Spencer had to employ some creative thinking in order to fulfil their wish list. Now he returns to find out how they have got on since cameras stopped rolling

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp heads back to Albrighton in Shropshire to catch up with Jamie Lea and Curtis, a couple whose Love It or List It journey began in 2019 with their three-bed terrace house that was a full-blown battleground. Jamie Lea dreamed of putting down roots, focusing on family life with daughter Scarlett and preparing for baby number two but Curtis had other ideas. Ever restless, he was glued to property sites, hunting for their next fixer-upper: a bigger home with a sprawling countryside garden for their growing family. Kirstie swooped in with a daring £30,000 Love It plan, and the couple rolled up their sleeves, stretching every penny with a mix of DIY grit and determination. Meanwhile, armed with a £280,000 List It budget, Phil uncovered some jaw-dropping homes - including a dreamy four-bed project - that left them seriously torn. Then, in 2023, Phil revisited and found the couple stuck in selling limbo. Never one to shy away from tough love, he dished out pearls of wisdom to help get them back on track. Now, Kirstie uncovers the next chapter in Jamie Lea and Curtiss roller coaster story. Did they finally manage to break free from their stalemate, sell their fully renovated terraced home and achieve their happily-ever-after?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: The danger cranks up as Lucy Shepherd and her nomadic hunter-gatherer team head through the Serengeti to a sacred volcano. As they cross paths with some of the wilds most dangerous predators, with prides of lions stalking nearby, their water supplies run dangerously low. The team must stay vigilant, relying on their skills to sense danger before it strikes

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: An old Cornwall jail becomes an extraordinary luxury retreat, and opulent ancient caves bring the South African wilderness up close. A historic Swedish lighthouse on the rugged rocks of Paternoster Island shines a light for luxury seekers, while in tropical northern Queensland, an eco-resort offers stunning treetop accommodation

programme.title: Beast (2022)
programme.desc: Recently widowed Nate Samuels and his teenage daughters Meredith and Norah find their holiday at a South African nature reserve turns into a nightmare when they are hunted by a huge rogue lion in the savanna. Action thriller, starring Idris Elba, Sharlto Copley, Leah Jeffries and Iyana Halley

programme.title: Assassin Club (2023)
programme.desc: Assassin-for-hire Morgan prepares to turn his back on contract killings to pursue romance with schoolteacher Sophie, who is unaware of his true calling with a snipers rifle. The hitman accepts a lucrative farewell pay day brokered by his mentor, Caldwell - six separate contracts, each worth $1million. However, Morgans targets are also assassins hired to kill him. Thriller, starring Henry Golding, Daniela Melchior, Sam Neill and Noomi Rapace

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef heads to the Seascape restaurant in the village of Islip on Long Island, New York, in a bid to change the fortunes of its owner Peter Matthews, who is nearly $1million in debt. Gordon is dismayed to discover unprotected meat and fish left next to mouldy pesto jars in the kitchen and plans to close down the eatery until radical changes are made

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett is joined by The Last Leg presenter Alex Brooker for a two-day tour of the Dutch city of Rotterdam. After taking the train direct from London, they launch into a break full of unusual activities, attractions and flavours. For accommodation, they swerve hotels in favour of Wikkelboats; eco-friendly floating houses insulated with corrugated cardboard, that come complete with hot tubs on deck. Once theyre settled in, they book onto the Rooftop tour, taking in some of the most interesting roofs and views in Rotterdam, including a farm and the oldest skyscraper in Europe. For dinner, they head to Fermin - a restaurant that loves to use fermented flavours in its unique and inventive menu. Day two begins with a culture hit as they head to Rotterdams largest gallerys storeroom, the futuristic Depot, before rounding off their caper with chips in peanut sauce, a stroll across a famous bridge and a game at the Dutch pinball museum, which gives Alex an idea for a whole new show

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: The property expert follows plucky country life newbies through the highs, lows and laughs, as they embrace their fresh starts in beautiful rural retreats. In this opening episode she meets James, who is creating a boutique country hotel, while Gary and Annette enter their village scarecrow competition

programme.desc: A fire leaves Rachel and Phoebe homeless, forcing them to impose on their pals hospitality. Meanwhile, Chandler gives Joey career advice, and Ross gets into trouble for dating a student. Comedy, with Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rosss girlfriend goes on a wild weekend away, leaving him to worry about what she is getting up to. Rachel longs for a date and Joeys fridge breaks down

programme.title: Bring It On (2000)
programme.desc: Successful high-school cheerleaders discover their popular dance moves were stolen from an inner-city rival by their ambitious former captain. The squad has to come up with a new routine quickly to salvage some pride and succeed at a forthcoming championships. Comedy, starring Kirsten Dunst, Eliza Dushku, Jesse Bradford and Gabrielle Union

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Mac and CHEESE
programme.desc: Joey auditions for a major TV show about a man and his crime-fighting robot, but Chandler almost ruins everything. Featuring clips from earlier episodes, starring Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeths Dad
programme.desc: Ross nervously prepares to meet Elizabeths dad for the first time and Phoebe decides to write a book about Monica and Chandler. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Pauls the Man
programme.desc: Elizabeth sneaks away with Ross to her grandmothers cabin for a romantic weekend, unaware her dad and Rachel have had exactly the same idea. American comedy, guest starring Bruce Willis

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler makes the mistake of asking Phoebe to help him choose an engagement ring for Monica, while Rachel urges Paul to open up and reveal his emotions but he ends up revealing too much. Guest starring Bruce Willis

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Proposal - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Chandlers plans for a romantic proposal are ruined by Richards reappearance. Ross gets an uncomfortable reminder of his girlfriends immaturity, while Joey unwittingly buys a boat at an auction. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and Tom Selleck

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Proposal - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Monica is left reeling by Richards proposal, which puts pressure on a nervous Chandler to bite the bullet and suggest she marry him instead. Comedy, guest starring Tom Selleck, with Courteney Cox and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An ecstatic Monica plans an evening out to celebrate her engagement to Chandler, but ends up accusing Rachel of trying to steal her thunder by kissing Ross. American comedy, starring Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica excitedly starts making preparations for her big day, only to discover her parents have spent all the wedding money on a beach house. Phoebe moves her massage parlour into Rosss apartment and Rachels choice of reading matter raises eyebrows

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. Celebrities experts offering advice are Dermot OLeary on explorers, Jessica Ennis-Hill on the Olympics, Roman Kemp on The Simpsons, Adam Kay on medicine, Angela Scanlon on Ireland, Kay Burley on the news, and Alex Brooker on boy bands

programme.title: Con Air (1997)
programme.desc: Former soldier Cameron Poe is released on parole and takes a flight home aboard a maximum-security plane conveying some of Americas most dangerous criminals. When the felons hijack the plane in mid-flight, led by criminal mastermind Cyrus the Virus, Poe is forced to intervene. Meanwhile, US marshal Vince Larkin has an ongoing battle on the ground to prevent the plane from being blown to pieces. Director Simon Wests action thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, John Cusack, John Malkovich, Steve Buscemi, Ving Rhames and Colm Meaney

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Guests including comedians Johnny Vegas and Joe Lycett join the irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr. Teams captained by Sean Lock and Jon Richardson answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock are joined by singers Olly Murs and Kimberly Wyatt, and comedians Matthew Crosby and Russell Peters. programme.title: Utopia

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor Bradley Walsh and his son Barney return for a second series as they embark on another road trip across America together, beginning their journey in Florida, the southernmost point of the country. From there, the pair head to the Palm Beach International Raceway, before getting up close and personal with sharks

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: For the next leg of their journey, the actor and his son head to the Great Smoky Mountains on the Tennessee-North Carolina border, where they go canoeing on the iconic rapids that featured in the film Deliverance. With Bradley left in need of a whisky, they head to a Hillbilly Jam for a nightcap and to experience the mountain tradition of clog dancing, before the pair try their hand at chopping wood with some competitive lumberjacks and taking to the woods to search for a mythical mountain beast

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedians entertainment revue continues, as he invites fellow comedy star Sarah Millican to take to the stage, and indie-pop singer-songwriter Tom Odell also performs. Its Carol Vordermans turn to take up residence in the royal box, and Michael harrasses her friends and family via Sent To All, and a mother-of-two is given a moment in the spotlight when she becomes the Unexpected Star of the Show - but not before she pays a trip to the Unexpected Bar, where she bumps into her idol, Westlifes Shane Filan

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: Tony resolves to focus on big things in the new year, but small things get in the way. Nat attempts to help a local community unleash a billion dollar government initiative

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: Snap decides to run for school council and is thrown into a world of double standards, while Bennigan, Adler, Feldman, and Cannon help with the campaign

programme.title: Broad City
programme.desc: Sitcom based on a popular web-series following the exploits of twentysomethings Abbi and Ilana, a pair of best friends struggling to navigate the difficulties of everyday life in New York City. programme.title: Broad City

programme.desc: Ray is disturbed to learn Michael and Geoffrey are playing fairies in the school play, especially as they chose the roles themselves. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Sullivan Sweeten and Sawyer Sweeten

programme.desc: Stefania, the woman Robert fell head over heels in love with during his holiday in Italy, turns up out of the blue with her father - but soon outstays her welcome. Comedy, guest starring Alex Meneses and David Proval

programme.desc: The lively comedian invites singer-songwriter and internet sensation Rick Astley to perform his new single at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. Plus, two very junior producers surprise their mother when they take over the show, and a trainee teacher receives the surprise of her life when she volunteers to help out at an art gallery, and ends up getting to live out her long-standing West End dream

programme.desc: For the next leg of their journey, Bradley and Barney visit the Red River Gorge in Kentucky, before heading to the supposedly haunted Poasttown Elementary School in Middletown, Ohio. At the end of a long day, Barney rewards his dad with a well-earned meal at a KFC restaurant in Kentucky - the home state of the chains founder Colonel Harland Sanders

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son head to Sweden, where they go head-to-head in a curling competition alongside the countrys womens team in Stockholm. The next day, Barney treats his dad to an infamous fishy delicacy for breakfast, then takes him paintballing with a Western twist, and finally lines up a musical surprise for Abba fan Bradley

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son conclude their latest trip by heading to Norway, where Barney has arranged to meet a local adventurer, who dares them to sit in icy water before showing them a spectacular stunt by diving from 20 metres head-first into a lake. They then go to Lillehammer home to sample the bobsleigh run used in the 1994 Winter Olympics, before going into the Arctic Circle to try out one of the worlds most northerly surfing spots

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. The pair begin their journey in Los Angeles, and head down to Muscle Beach to lift weights, before taking part in a game of volleyball. The following day, Bradley is terrified to hear that the agenda involves a 14,000ft skydive

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Actor Bradley Walsh and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. In the second leg of their journey, the pair leave the city of Los Angeles behind and make their way down the famous Route 66 to the southwestern state of Arizona. Here, they ride through a deserted ghost town, before the father and son reach Lake Havasu City, where Barney has arranged for them to try jet-skiing. Finally, they attend a Cowboy College, where they learn to become real-life horsemen

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney arrive in Texas, where they enjoy driving around in tanks, experience space travel in a centrifuge and hear campfire tales about UFOs. First up, the pair undertake some centrifuge training, which is used to prepare astronauts for the crushing gravitational forces produced at take-off from the extreme exhilaration. They also head to the outskirts of Houston to meet some UFO enthusiasts who investigate claimed sightings of extra-terrestrials, and are gripped by stories of spaceships blocking roads and people being taken by aliens for experiments

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney embark on the final leg of their journey, which sees the pair arrive in the Louisiana city of New Orleans. Here, they visit a spiritual voodoo priest for a spot of energy cleansing, and feed alligators in the Bayou with Captain Billy, who knows every corner of the wetlands, having been born and raised on the bayous of South Louisiana. Later, Bradley hops on board the Natchez jazz Steamboat, before the pair take to the streets to lead a spectacular parade with a six-piece band

programme.desc: Marge poses for a charity calendar and becomes Springfields number-one sex symbol, while Carl gets a promotion at the plant, before going on a power trip and hiring Homer as his new assistant

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Grampa team up to create a new sport that rivals pickleball, until Homer kicks Grampa off the team

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Jazz and Ingas friendship comes under the spotlight once again. Inga admits to friends that shes confused by Jazzs account of what happened between them, and insists that it was never romantic, but Jazz still feels like she needs clarity. Jules brother, Philip, gets into more hot water when he reveals to his friends that Georgia dropped the L-word - and even though he said it back, he didnt mean it

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willys Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: At the sixth Commitment Ceremony, the fallout from hurtful screenshots and lingering conflict continues to weigh heavily on the group. One couples relationship is hanging by a thread, and there are brutal truths about love, trust and the future

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: A shock split lingers in the air as homestays begin. Harsh truths are laid bare for one couple - and family and friends steaming in with their own opinions arent exactly helpful

programme.title: Rat Race (2001)
programme.desc: A casino magnate approaches a group of no-hopers with the offer of $2million to whoever retrieves the sum from a locker in a train station in New Mexico, prompting a madcap cross-continent dash. Meanwhile, the casino owners high-rolling gambler friends place bets on which of the bumbling contestants will win. Comedy, with Rowan Atkinson, John Cleese, Whoopi Goldberg, Kathy Bates, Seth Green and Cuba Gooding Jr

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Comic Book Guys origin story is revealed as he and his wife Kumiko debate having a baby

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds his old teachers diary and learns a surprising secret, while Lisa faces a dilemma when she discovers an even bigger eye-opener herself

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Savile Row tailor Riki has returned to the dating game after losing a lot of weight, but still struggles to see why women would find him attractive. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the second round of the culinary competition, which this time focuses on biscuits. For the signature round, the contestants must concoct a luxurious chocolate-coated bake. The technical challenge is a nostalgic one for Paul Hollywood, who asks the contestants to prepare a snack that was a favourite of his fathers. Finally, the showstopper round requires the bakers to rise to an eye-catching challenge that is designed to test which of them will snap under the pressure

programme.title: Mary Berry Everyday
programme.desc: The food writer and former Great British Bake Off judge continues her celebration of the everyday food and ingredients she has always loved to cook, and which have formed the cornerstone of her work for more than six decades. In this edition, Mary shares recipes for inspiring hearty dishes full of wholesome goodness, from her secret tip for a rich bolognese sauce to a soup that will warm the cockles. She also dons a white suit and tries her hand at beekeeping, collecting fresh honey to make a winning pudding

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James and fellow chef Mark Jordan discover the culinary delights of Guernsey. They sample local speciality Gache cake and a seafood platter fit for a king, while James uses the islands native dairy produce to make a creamy rice pudding with chargrilled peaches. The duo set themselves a fishing challenge by attempting to catch a mighty turbot, and James finishes the day by cooking a mouthwatering turbot dish

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands

programme.desc: The cookery writer and Great British Bake Off judge shares recipes, tips and handy culinary hacks and is joined by her husband John and friends. In the first episode, Prue welcomes Sandi Toksvig, who cooks two dishes from the 1920s that were printed in pamphlets put together by women across the country to fundraise, but the recipes have rather vague instructions and measurements

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares roast shoulder of lamb with all the trimmings, before turning the leftovers into Moroccan-style crispy pastillas, and makes good use of stale bread by using it as part of a panzanella salad. The chef also shows a lover of takeaways how to dish up a beef rendang from the remains of a cut of brisket, and helps two people reduce their food waste

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates wallet-friendly recipes for pot-roasted ham hocks, squash and spinach rotolo, and steak and chips, and shows a takeaway lover how to make sweet and sour fish balls for a fraction of the price of her favourite Chinese treat. The chef also inspires a pair of food wasters to make good use of all their leftover salad

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: Dave and Si explore the region around the River Severn, an area famous for its fusion of flavours and meet locals with their own special recipes. They visit a street food stall known as Babhaus, which brings a Mexican fusion menu to Newport and Netherend Farm in Gloucestershire where they meet Wyndham and Linda, who have developed a new product, nutty clarified butter Ghee. In the town of Tewkesbury they discover Samantha, who creates mustard balls, which the boys learn how to make the traditional way

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: The duo explore Dorset and Devon, where they learn about the production of watercress and meet a blacksmith who supplies them with new knives

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King embark on a 2,000-mile journey along the famous American road, taking them through eight different states, each with their own history, flavours and people. They begin by learning about Chicagos meatpacking industry, before moving on to small-town American, where they spend time with the Amish community, cooking together and learning about their different way of life. Their first leg ends in St Louis, where they try concrete custard - a treat so rich and thick it has to be served upside down

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit a biker bar in Missouri to find out about the origins of Route 66, before heading west, where they visit a roadside museum described as a love letter to the road. They also stop off for lunch in Kansas, sample Yorkshire pudding wraps in Tulsa and finally reach rural Oklahoma, where they cook with members of the Cherokee nation

programme.desc: Memories of July 1996, when a bomb exploded while thousands were at Centennial Park for the Atlanta Olympics. The FBI investigated terrorism, but ended up tracking a serial bomber

programme.desc: A case in which a wealthy Florida psychiatrist and his son were shot dead and their home ransacked. Investigators suspected robbery until they realised that only a gun and a car were missing. They then worked backward to uncover a motive so they could track down the killer

programme.title: The Big Swindle
programme.desc: £45,000 is donated to help fund lifesaving cancer treatment for 39-year-old Nicole Elkabbas, but a photograph raises suspicions that everything is a lie

programme.title: The Big Swindle
programme.desc: Wayne Johncock is scammed out of £180,000 by his neighbour, Rajesh Ghedia. As Ghedias lies unravel, police discover that Wayne is not his only victim

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide
programme.desc: The case of real estate agent Beverly Carter, who vanished after meeting a new client. Police had to establish whether anyone had a reason to harm her in a bid to determine what had happened

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Julie Bowling was a respected cancer therapist and funeral home worker. When she was murdered, the focus turned to her husbands secret life and shaky finances

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: The case of Dena Raley-McCluskey, who disappeared in 1999. After eight years of searching, California police believed they had found her body and the man responsible for her death

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: The stabbing of Arkansas cheerleader Julie Heath in October 1993. Eric Nance raped and murdered the 18-year-old, and 12 years later was put to death for the crime

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: The murder of 24-year-old Crystal Houston in the desert town of Socorro, New Mexico. She died in April 2001, 14 months after her older sister, Stephanie, was killed in a suspicious accident

programme.title: The Killer in My Family
programme.desc: Relatives of serial killer Jo Dennehy reveal how her shocking crimes impacted the family. Were there any signs of her murderous intentions

programme.title: The Killer in My Family
programme.desc: Relatives of serial killer Robert Maudsley reveal how his shocking crimes impacted the family. Were there any signs of his murderous intentions

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
programme.desc: A case in which a woman entered into an affair with her daughters grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
programme.desc: A case that began when a high-flying attorney and one of his clients began an illicit affair. His infatuation led to obsession and when their adulterous relationship was revealed, the laws of attraction proved fatal

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: When two members of a prominent family were murdered in Arkansas, a teenage boy was arrested and pleaded guilty. For 24 years one woman believed he was innocent - a member of the victims family. However, once released she was confronted with his true nature

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: After Texas woman Stacey Stites was raped and murdered, a trial sparked a racially charged debate over whether Rodney Reed was an innocent man had been condemned to death. As new evidence caame to light it seemed the truth would never be known

programme.title: Still a Mystery
programme.desc: The murder of a young woman while on a trip to her fathers homeland. Plus, the young mother and her baby shot as they are driving. Now the search is on to bring the killers to justice

programme.title: Still a Mystery
programme.desc: A 22-year-old National Guard officer with a bright future who drowned in water only a few inches deep. Plus, the disappearance of a 13-year-old cheerleader, with authorities turning up evidence that pointed to a gruesome murder

programme.title: Truth About Murder with Sunny Hostin
programme.desc: Former prosecutor Sunny Hostin revisits the events of 2013 and the premeditated murder of 23-year-old mother Danielle Marshall, found dead in her Atlanta kitchen

programme.title: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: Documentary series examining how the initial excitement of a new love can end terribly wrong. This edition recalls a case in which high school student Melissa thought she was on the verge of a bright future after meeting Robert Burton. However, when she tried to pursue her ambitions, his jealousy led to terror

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Wangler and his wife Kathy appear to live the middle-class dream. But their façade collapses as a pre-meditated execution rips their family apart

programme.title: Fatal Affairs
programme.desc: A steamy affair ignites between two teachers. When one of them turns out to be married, the lust turns to tragedy, and a body winds up in a ditch

programme.title: A Body in the Basement
programme.desc: In 2017, an Ohio couple finds a dismembered body in a basement freezer. It unlocks a harrowing mystery surrounding a missing woman and a tragic love triangle

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: A man marries two women at once, but his secret double life ends in gruesome tragedy. Plus, a wife takes in a toy-boy right under her husbands nose

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: Jam Master Jay, best known as Run-DMCs DJ, was killed in his recording studio. An exclusive interview with an eyewitness sheds light on this decades-old cold case

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: A hopeful soap opera star shines in the background - but her rise crashes instantly because someone doesnt want to see her succeed

programme.title: Married with Secrets
programme.desc: A case in which LAPD investigators hunted a criminal behind the disappearance of expensive yachts. As inquiries proceeded, they found a mild-mannered man among their own ranks who was involved in a lot more than just boat theft

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

Crime thriller, starring Richard Gere and Claire Danes

Western, starring Richard Crenna, Stephen Boyd, Rosanna Schiaffino and Farley Granger

programme.desc: Romano and Hooker head for Chinatown to investigate a routine case - and discover crooks are operating a thriving illicit trade in guns. Vintage drama, with William Shatner

programme.title: The Day of the Triffids (1962)
programme.desc: A meteor shower blinds the majority of Earths population and heralds the arrival of a race of dangerous carnivorous walking plants. As the monsters multiply and prey on the blind, the remaining sighted people join forces to try to put an end to the invasion. Sci-fi thriller, starring Howard Keel, Janette Scott, Nicole Maurey and Mervyn Johns

programme.title: First Men in the Moon (1964)
programme.desc: An eccentric Victorian inventor discovers a strange material that defies gravity and uses it to build the worlds first spaceship. Leading an expedition to the moon, he is astonished to discover it is inhabited by giant ants and caterpillar-like creatures. Sci-fi adventure based on HG Wells novel, starring Lionel Jeffries, Edward Judd, Martha Hyer and Miles Malleson, with special effects by Ray Harryhausen

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk faces court martial, charged with causing the death of a crewman by jettisoning a dangerous pod without giving him time to get clear. As the case proceeds, the captain looks increasingly guilty of the crime, until Spock considers the possibility that the evidence could be misleading. William Shatner and Elisha Cook Jr star

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve is forced to use all his bionic powers to subdue an astronaut who has gained incredible strength. Mike Farrell guest stars

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The veteran officer uncovers a pornography racket while investigating the murder of a cheerleader who recently had an abortion and was a heavy cocaine user. William Shatner stars

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The lawman tries to prevent a former ranger from exacting revenge on a gang of jewellery thieves who shot his daughter

programme.title: Wanted (2008)
programme.desc: A disillusioned man learns his father was a member of a secret society of superpowered assassins dedicated to eliminating people who are destined to commit acts of evil in the future. Having inherited his fathers special abilities, he is recruited into the organisation and must take on a former member who has betrayed it. Action adventure, starring James McAvoy, Angelina Jolie and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Kickboxer (1989)
programme.desc: A martial arts student witnesses his brother being brutally defeated in the ring by a Thai champion in a fight that leaves him paralysed. Vowing revenge, he seeks out the help of a reclusive master, under whose tutelage he hones his skills until he is ready to confront his enemy. Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dennis Alexio and Haskell V Anderson

programme.title: The Courier (2019)
programme.desc: A motorbike delivery rider discovers she is transporting a bomb meant for a witness testifying against a crime lord. Thriller, starring Olga Kurylenko and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Stagecoach (2016)
programme.desc: Former outlaw Nathaniel Reeds peaceful existence on the Texas frontier is shattered when a vengeful US Marshal starts hunting him down. Western, starring Trace Adkins

programme.title: Donovans Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medics snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero

programme.title: The Vengeance of She (1968)
programme.desc: A woman with no memory is drawn into a plot to return the tyrannical ruler of an ancient city to everlasting life. Fantasy adventure, starring Olga Schoberová and John Richardson

programme.title: Dr Terrors House of Horrors (1965)
programme.desc: An enigmatic stranger offers to read the fortunes of five men he meets on a train, leading to a sequence of twisted tales. A werewolf prowls a stately home, a man discovers his new bride is a vampire, a living plant envelops a house, a musician dabbles in voodoo and a disembodied hand menaces an art critic. Compendium of horror stories, starring Peter Cushing, Christopher Lee and Donald Sutherland

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An employer soon yearns for the workforce he foolishly replaced with robots. Directed by Lethal Weapons Richard Donner

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A folk songs lyrics unexpectedly start mirroring shocking events

programme.title: Immortals (2011)
programme.desc: A power-mad ancient Greek king raises an army with the intention of not only conquering the known world, but using a mystical weapon to unleash the legendary titans and overthrow the gods. The immortal deities are unable to interfere directly, so select a mortal man to be their champion and defeat the tyrant. Mythological adventure, starring Henry Cavill and Mickey Rourke

programme.title: Hammer of the Gods (2013)
programme.desc: A Viking prince is sent on a dangerous quest by his dying father. The young warrior must seek out his older brother, who was exiled from the kingdom years before, and persuade him to return home and defend the land from invasion. The challenges he faces on the way shape him into a worthy heir to the throne. Action adventure, starring Charlie Bewley and Clive Standen

programme.title: London Heist (2017)
programme.desc: Armed robber Jack Cregan goes on the warpath after his heist money is stolen and his father is murdered. He battles to unravel the mystery and exact brutal revenge on all those responsible while being pursued by gangland criminals and a corrupt police detective. Gangster thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass

programme.title: The Outsider (2014)
programme.desc: A British military contractor leaves Afghanistan for Los Angeles when he receives word that his daughter has died there. However, he discovers the body identified as her is someone else, and embarks on a rampage of violence through the criminal underworld to discover what has really happened to her. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass, Jason Patric and James Caan

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Beth, 68, is rushed to St Georges after falling down a flight of stairs and badly breaking her ankle, meaning she faces emergency surgery and intensive physiotherapy to walk again. Leigh, 67, is admitted with head injuries after being knocked off his bicycle in a hit-and-run incident and medics are concerned he has suffered a severe trauma to his head as he was not wearing a helmet, while 26-year-old Luke arrives in AandE after an accident at work involving an electric saw

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Cumbrian farmer Dennis has been pierced in the chest by a large metal spike. Motorcyclist Ian is in a critical condition after a crash in the Lake District. Plus, toddler Alistair is flown to a specialist burns unit after being badly scalded

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tom is rushed to St Georges after crashing his bike head first into a parked car while racing a friend. Doctors order a CT scan to assess his injuries and must decide whether he will need emergency surgery to his face. Plus, 26-year-old Andy comes to AandE after injuring his knee during a game of Frisbee, and 51-year-old Jason arrives after suffering from blurred vision for two days

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Seventy-five-year-old Gerry is rushed to AandE with a dangerously high heart rate of more than 250bpm, and doctors suspect an underlying chest infection is the cause. Meanwhile, 92-year-old Margaret arrives at St Georges after falling over and hitting her head, and six-year-old Daniel is treated for an infected blister on his foot

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the teams favourite investigations, including Kate Quiltons visit to McVities in Carlisle to find out why so many biscuits have little holes all over them. Jimmy Doherty heads to Portugal to see how corks are made for wine bottles, while Matt Tebbutt is in Italy to learn why mascarpone is more expensive than other soft cheeses

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien restore eight items, including a pine blanket chest, a pair of battlefield telephones and some gothic church windows

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are in Wales, where they pick up and restore a dentists table and a barbers chair, and make a coffee table out of parquet flooring

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Wisteria House, Hampshire, where owner Jane Faulkner invites guests to her establishment. Later, the group members try their hands at milking a cow, while 25-year-old Zak causes surprises when he reveals his years of hospitality experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit The Living Room BandB in Bournemouth on their second night, which is co-owned by 25-year-old Zak Busby-Pelekanou. While at the establishment, Mike and Charlie have a hairy issue, and Jane and Amy encounter a spider, before getting to grips with an ambitious breakfast menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Valley Hotel in Anglesey, where owner Mike Lewis hopes his five-star pedigree will help him reap dividends in the competition. After a visit to a local RNLI station, guests Jane and Amy are left feeling sluggish when they spot an unwanted visitor in their room, and their criticism leaves the hosts looking for answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Elvira Barratt welcome the contestants to Barratts at Tyn Rhyl, Denbighshire, but the group has an unpleasant experience on arrival. The guests take part in an activity at a local cookery school where they are taught the art of preparing and cooking sheeps testicles. However, come feedback time, the hosts are left feeling distraught

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet to find out who earned the most and have it out with their rivals. Jane and Amy kick off proceedings with a gripe over David and Elviras coffee criticism, yet are confronted themselves by Zak, who has a score to settle. Mike and Charlie of the Valley Hotel want to get to the bottom of an unwanted intruder during their stay at Wisteria House, and the ladies are challenged again regarding their cleanliness comments. Emotions run high as the cash is counted and the winner is revealed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring rapper Warren Temple kicks off a week of dinner parties in Peterborough, where he hopes his Spanish-influenced menu will impress his guests - ethical trader Donna Trafford, glamour model Susie Hutson, straight-talking professional Vicki Culverhouse and veterinary nurse Robin Hills - and make him an early contender for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ethical trader Donna Trafford hosts the second night in Peterborough, and plans to wow her guests with a colourful evening of tasty food and relaxed fun in a bid to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in Peterborough, glamour model and columnist Susie Hutson is out to prove shes not the dizzy blonde some of the guests assume she is - and it doesnt take long for ethical trader Donna Trafford and would-be rapper Warren Temple to make an unexpected discovery that proves theres more to Susie than meets the eye

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Straight-talking businesswomen Vicki Culverhouse hosts the fourth night of the competition in Peterborough. She surprises the group when she unleashes some poetry at the dinner table, after having been very direct with the other diners throughout the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Veterinary nurse Robin Hills is the final host of the competition in Peterborough. He prepares an animal-themed evening, accompanied by well-presented cuisine, which he hopes will be a big hit with his guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Trecarne House in Liskeard, Cornwall, where owners Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan hope to demonstrate that their BandB offers the best value for money. The pair win the groups admiration by sharing their life story, but one guest stirs up intrigue by holding his cards close to his chest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners spend their second night of the competition at the Magna Carta at Windsor in Berkshire, a five-star floating bed and breakfast run by Captain Dominic Read. The guests are pleasantly surprised upon arrival, but not all are impressed by the standard of the accommodation - and a cracked teapot at the breakfast table leads to trouble for the proprietor

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third BandB of the week is Ash Cottage near Leeds Castle in Kent, where the unusual decor is an eye-opener for the guests but is not everyones cup of tea. Trish and Tom get heated over the instant coffee before owners Rayne and Chris Deal take their fellow contestants to Chatham Dockyard to try their hands at rope-making

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final guest house of the week is A Room with a View in Brighton, where owner Stephen Bull and housekeeper Joanna Harris hope their nine-room establishment will impress the contestants. Things get off to a good start when Rayne and Chris Deal are impressed by the cleanliness of the property, but things take a turn for the worse when breakfast gets the thumbs down

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners come together to confront their critics face-to-face. Hosts of Trecarne House in Cornwall Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan raise issues with Magna Cartas Dominic Read on his mark for their hosting, while he has a bone to pick with them over criticism of his five-star floating BandB. Stephen and Joanna of A Room with a View in Brighton receive complaints about their breakfast, and tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil catch up with Steph and Mark who, in 2011, asked for their help to find a property they could live together and eventually have children in. Phil helped them find a project property with three bedrooms for nearly £40,000 under their budget. Today, they are still in the property which looks now looks very different. In 2020, Kirstie and Phil met Elliot and James who were looking to find a home they could share with four bedrooms and an open plan entertaining space in London. After a struggle with the budget, Kirstie found the pair a property, now Phil is back to find out what they have done with the space

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with Alex and Danny Moore from Preston, who back in 2017 could not decide whether to stay in their quiet cul-de-sac or up sticks and move to the country. Kirstie Allsopp embarked on a loft conversion - claiming its the best she has ever done - while Phil pulled some cracking rural properties out of the bag. But after making their decision, what was next for the couple?

programme.title: Panda
programme.desc: Comedy about a pacifist former cop who returns to the force to uphold the law in his own laidback, non-violent way. Panda is baffled by his feelings for Lola, who is marrying someone else. A professional mermaid is found drifting under the water at the local aquarium. Panda becomes frustrated when he learns that his dodgy ex-girlfriend is entangled in the crime and wants him to pull her out. In French

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 43-year-old cyclist is brought to AandE after crashing face first into a car, with injuries are so severe that he was put into an induced coma at the scene. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Pat awaits the results of an X-ray after injuring her leg on holiday, and 89-year-old Adrian complains of chest pain

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams battle to save cyclist Grahams partially amputated leg, while Rose is freed from a rolled car in Buckinghamshire. Gary suffers a rare and extremely serious complete knee dislocation playing football, but strong pain relief results in some unexpected hilarity

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Sunderland, medics must work quickly to try and save a womans life following a major gas explosion. A boating accident on the Norfolk Broads leaves holidaymaker Carol with a partially amputated foot. Plus, a man suffers multiple serious injuries when he comes off his motorbike

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 43-year-old cyclist is brought to AandE after crashing face first into a car, with injuries are so severe that he was put into an induced coma at the scene. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Pat awaits the results of an X-ray after injuring her leg on holiday, and 89-year-old Adrian complains of chest pain

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Beth, 68, is rushed to St Georges after falling down a flight of stairs and badly breaking her ankle, meaning she faces emergency surgery and intensive physiotherapy to walk again. Leigh, 67, is admitted with head injuries after being knocked off his bicycle in a hit-and-run incident and medics are concerned he has suffered a severe trauma to his head as he was not wearing a helmet, while 26-year-old Luke arrives in AandE after an accident at work involving an electric saw

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Europes biggest brewery - Heineken in the Netherlands - on a mission to explain the difference between lager and ale. His journey takes a surprising twist when he comes face to face with the mother of all lagers. Kate Quilton sets Matt Tebbutt the challenge of making crumpets, and finds out how they get filled with unique holes at the Warburtons factory in Enfield, north London. Matt also heads for snowy Canada to discover why maple syrup is so expensive, and finds out that maple syrup robberies are a big concern to the industry

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Themis and Paolo have been visiting the unspoilt beaches of Kapparis in Cyprus for the past six years and now they want to buy their own holiday home. Jasmine Harman lines up five properties for their £180,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is Nateby Inn in Cumbria, where landlady Gaynor Walker is ready with a warm welcome. A trip to Gaynors local brewery turns out to be a barrel of laughs when one guest beats another in a cask-rolling competition, before a broken cooker creates chaos in the kitchen the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Outfields Farm Bed and Breakfast in Ravensden, Bedfordshire, on their second stay, where proprietors Graham and Julia Ashley treat them to an afternoon of indoor sky-diving before hosting a dinner filled with surprises. The guests enjoy a good nights sleep, but one of the owners is expecting hassle at breakfast time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to At Home in Chiswick, west London, where artist Bob Osbourne appears to take a rather laid-back approach to running his BandB. On arrival, guests are pleasantly surprised by their first impressions of the communal living space-come-mini art gallery - but its not long before they are dishing the dirt

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition draws to a close at the Ammonite Lodge guesthouse in Chard, Somerset, where owners Andrew and Clare Ashmore hope to excite their guests with a game of skittles. During the final dinner of the week, the competitors discuss their first impressions of each other, and Bob and Julia share some amusing observations with the group

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners confront their critics face to face, and the winners are announced. Nateby Inn host Gaynor takes issue with Graham and Julias reduced marks for cobwebs. The conversation becomes heated when Outfields Farms owners tackle Gaynors complaints in return, and Georgie jumps to their defence. Artist Bob Osborne has a long list of grievances he wants to address, and Julia is left cringing when her previous comments rebound on her

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Jonathan Broom and his wife Deborah have put everything on hold while he pursues his dream of building a miniature Hollywood Hills-style mansion. They stumble across a scrap of land in north London, but its fraught with problems and the only way they can complete the £1million home is by sinking half of it six metres below ground. Surrounded on all sides by their neighbours back gardens, the couple have to dismantle walls and fences and promise to put them back together again, and thats just the start of their difficulties. Kevin McCloud follows their progress

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a master craftsman whose dream is to build a castle in rural Devon made entirely of mud. Kevin McCabe plans to form the huge property out of two vast curved roundhouses - the largest of which is inspired by the natural geometry of a snail shell - connected by glazing and topped with wildflower meadow roofs to mirror the surrounding countryside. However, the project involves mixing and laying a mind-boggling 2,000 tons of cob, all during warm, sunny weather - and the sheer scale of the task soon becomes clear

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Carol longs to buy a holiday home for her and her husband on the island of Lanzarote that will work for all four generations of their family. She particularly loves the east coast, with its buzzing resorts of Costa Teguise and Puerto del Carmen, and is looking for a town house or apartment with a pool and a view from the terrace. With a budget of £150,000 - and Carols daughter-in-law-Donna coming along to help - Jasmine Harman sets out to find a property to please everyone

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: PR manager Emmy Webster kicks off a week of dinner parties in Yeovil, Somerset, where she hopes her locally sourced produce will impress her guests - self-proclaimed country bumpkin Mel Dunford, used-car salesman Andy Neil, radio broadcaster Steve Carpenter and businessman Alan Bunter - and make her an early contender for the £1,000 prize. However, she is caught out when her hollandaise sauce is found to have been bought from a shop

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Steve Carpenter hosts the second dinner party in Yeovil, Somerset, hoping his country-style cooking and carefully sourced ingredients will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, the entertainer lets his focus slip when he allows an unwanted ingredient onto one plate

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hosting the third dinner party in Yeovil is diminutive fork-lift truck driver Mel Dunford. With an exotic menu - including duck vindaloo, which is her own invention - Mel hopes to prove her doubters wrong. And its not just her surprise culinary skills that wow her guests - she also breaks into song, leaving everyone astounded

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businessman Alan Bunter hosts the fourth dinner party in the Yeovil area of Somerset, hoping that his enthusiasm for all things Japanese will help propel him into the lead. However, car salesman Andy Neil and DJ Steve Carpenter fail to be influenced by the calm atmosphere and spend the evening arguing. As the ladies at the table struggle to get a word in, the menu of rotten beans, tofu cheesecake and soggy noodles fails to impress

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Last to host in Yeovil is 50-year-old used-car dealer Andy Neil, who is supremely confident that his fine dining experience, along with the beautiful surroundings of his home, will bag him the £1,000 prize. Six amuse-bouches for his starter are a visual and culinary treat, but his constant questions and need for feedback and praise threaten to put off his fellow diners. He also has to contend with local radio personality Steve Carpenter jockeying for position as top dog of the group, and fussy eater Mel Dunford, who is not afraid to tell him exactly what she thinks of his fancy food

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This weeks competition begins at Newquay Beach Hotel, where the guests spend an afternoon surfing and a revelation leaves one set of hosts unsure about their chances

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mum and daughter Mandy and Elly host the weeks second visit at Devon Heaven Hideaways, where they offer a touch of bliss at their plush glampsite. First impressions are excellent, everyone enjoys a trip to a castle, and a riverside breakfast is a roaring success. So why do the hosts end up shocked by their scores?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For visit three of the week, the BandBers head to Ceredigion, where married couple Stuart and Amy offer a great big slice of vintage Americana at their Tin Can Retreat. Stuart and Amy get everyone revved up with an afternoon of electric biking, but are left eating dust after some cleanliness complaints in their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Mandy host the weeks final visit at The Thorverton Arms in Devon. Their classic country pub seems to put a smile on everyones faces - until things get hairy for one pair. The hosts hope a belly-busting breakfast can swing things back in their favour

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The weeks scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old motorcyclist Michelle is rushed to AandE after crashing head first into a lamp-post, with scans revealing that she has broken bones in her neck, arm and shoulder and requires emergency surgery. Timothy, 69, arrives at St Georges after riding his bicycle into the back of a parked ambulance, while 33-year-old expectant mother Eleanor is admitted after cutting her thumb on a meat cleaver

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Seventy-one-year-old Tony is rushed to AandE by air ambulance after falling head first onto a tiled floor while doing DIY in his kitchen. Meanwhile, 23-year-old Charlies facial injuries are treated after he was assaulted on his way home from a night out. A 10-year-old girl, Lucy, arrives at St Georges after having seizures for the past 48 hours

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Tulsi is airlifted to St Georges after falling from a cliff near her home in Hastings, and CT scans reveal she requires emergency brain surgery. Meanwhile, 39-year-old Adam is rushed to AandE after his motorbike collided with a car, leaving him with an obvious and painful leg injury, and 70-year-old retired mechanic Ron is treated after trapping his hand between two vehicles while helping his friend fix their car

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crew members take drastic steps to reset a patients dangerously fast heartbeat, a cyclist crashes in a remote area, and a motorist is injured in a road accident

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old motorcyclist Michelle is rushed to AandE after crashing head first into a lamp-post, with scans revealing that she has broken bones in her neck, arm and shoulder and requires emergency surgery. Timothy, 69, arrives at St Georges after riding his bicycle into the back of a parked ambulance, while 33-year-old expectant mother Eleanor is admitted after cutting her thumb on a meat cleaver

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Seventy-one-year-old Tony is rushed to AandE by air ambulance after falling head first onto a tiled floor while doing DIY in his kitchen. Meanwhile, 23-year-old Charlies facial injuries are treated after he was assaulted on his way home from a night out. A 10-year-old girl, Lucy, arrives at St Georges after having seizures for the past 48 hours

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations, including Jimmy Doherty visiting Spain to find out how much orange goes into squash. Matt Tebbutt tries to solve the age-old mystery of how to get ketchup out of the bottle smoothly, while Kate Quilton checks Marmites TV advert claims that a DNA test can predict whether people are more likely to love it or hate it

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Sunderland, medics must work quickly to try and save a womans life following a major gas explosion. A boating accident on the Norfolk Broads leaves holidaymaker Carol with a partially amputated foot. Plus, a man suffers multiple serious injuries when he comes off his motorbike

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tom is rushed to St Georges after crashing his bike head first into a parked car while racing a friend. Doctors order a CT scan to assess his injuries and must decide whether he will need emergency surgery to his face. Plus, 26-year-old Andy comes to AandE after injuring his knee during a game of Frisbee, and 51-year-old Jason arrives after suffering from blurred vision for two days

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Seventy-five-year-old Gerry is rushed to AandE with a dangerously high heart rate of more than 250bpm, and doctors suspect an underlying chest infection is the cause. Meanwhile, 92-year-old Margaret arrives at St Georges after falling over and hitting her head, and six-year-old Daniel is treated for an infected blister on his foot

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the teams favourite investigations, including Kate Quiltons visit to McVities in Carlisle to find out why so many biscuits have little holes all over them. Jimmy Doherty heads to Portugal to see how corks are made for wine bottles, while Matt Tebbutt is in Italy to learn why mascarpone is more expensive than other soft cheeses

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien restore eight items, including a pine blanket chest, a pair of battlefield telephones and some gothic church windows

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are in Wales, where they pick up and restore a dentists table and a barbers chair, and make a coffee table out of parquet flooring

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Wisteria House, Hampshire, where owner Jane Faulkner invites guests to her establishment. Later, the group members try their hands at milking a cow, while 25-year-old Zak causes surprises when he reveals his years of hospitality experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit The Living Room BandB in Bournemouth on their second night, which is co-owned by 25-year-old Zak Busby-Pelekanou. While at the establishment, Mike and Charlie have a hairy issue, and Jane and Amy encounter a spider, before getting to grips with an ambitious breakfast menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Valley Hotel in Anglesey, where owner Mike Lewis hopes his five-star pedigree will help him reap dividends in the competition. After a visit to a local RNLI station, guests Jane and Amy are left feeling sluggish when they spot an unwanted visitor in their room, and their criticism leaves the hosts looking for answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Elvira Barratt welcome the contestants to Barratts at Tyn Rhyl, Denbighshire, but the group has an unpleasant experience on arrival. The guests take part in an activity at a local cookery school where they are taught the art of preparing and cooking sheeps testicles. However, come feedback time, the hosts are left feeling distraught

programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a master craftsman whose dream is to build a castle in rural Devon made entirely of mud. Kevin McCabe plans to form the huge property out of two vast curved roundhouses - the largest of which is inspired by the natural geometry of a snail shell - connected by glazing and topped with wildflower meadow roofs to mirror the surrounding countryside. However, the project involves mixing and laying a mind-boggling 2,000 tons of cob, all during warm, sunny weather - and the sheer scale of the task soon becomes clear

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Carol longs to buy a holiday home for her and her husband on the island of Lanzarote that will work for all four generations of their family. She particularly loves the east coast, with its buzzing resorts of Costa Teguise and Puerto del Carmen, and is looking for a town house or apartment with a pool and a view from the terrace. With a budget of £150,000 - and Carols daughter-in-law-Donna coming along to help - Jasmine Harman sets out to find a property to please everyone

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: PR manager Emmy Webster kicks off a week of dinner parties in Yeovil, Somerset, where she hopes her locally sourced produce will impress her guests - self-proclaimed country bumpkin Mel Dunford, used-car salesman Andy Neil, radio broadcaster Steve Carpenter and businessman Alan Bunter - and make her an early contender for the £1,000 prize. However, she is caught out when her hollandaise sauce is found to have been bought from a shop

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Steve Carpenter hosts the second dinner party in Yeovil, Somerset, hoping his country-style cooking and carefully sourced ingredients will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, the entertainer lets his focus slip when he allows an unwanted ingredient onto one plate

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hosting the third dinner party in Yeovil is diminutive fork-lift truck driver Mel Dunford. With an exotic menu - including duck vindaloo, which is her own invention - Mel hopes to prove her doubters wrong. And its not just her surprise culinary skills that wow her guests - she also breaks into song, leaving everyone astounded

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businessman Alan Bunter hosts the fourth dinner party in the Yeovil area of Somerset, hoping that his enthusiasm for all things Japanese will help propel him into the lead. However, car salesman Andy Neil and DJ Steve Carpenter fail to be influenced by the calm atmosphere and spend the evening arguing. As the ladies at the table struggle to get a word in, the menu of rotten beans, tofu cheesecake and soggy noodles fails to impress

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Last to host in Yeovil is 50-year-old used-car dealer Andy Neil, who is supremely confident that his fine dining experience, along with the beautiful surroundings of his home, will bag him the £1,000 prize. Six amuse-bouches for his starter are a visual and culinary treat, but his constant questions and need for feedback and praise threaten to put off his fellow diners. He also has to contend with local radio personality Steve Carpenter jockeying for position as top dog of the group, and fussy eater Mel Dunford, who is not afraid to tell him exactly what she thinks of his fancy food

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This weeks competition begins at Newquay Beach Hotel, where the guests spend an afternoon surfing and a revelation leaves one set of hosts unsure about their chances

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mum and daughter Mandy and Elly host the weeks second visit at Devon Heaven Hideaways, where they offer a touch of bliss at their plush glampsite. First impressions are excellent, everyone enjoys a trip to a castle, and a riverside breakfast is a roaring success. So why do the hosts end up shocked by their scores?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For visit three of the week, the BandBers head to Ceredigion, where married couple Stuart and Amy offer a great big slice of vintage Americana at their Tin Can Retreat. Stuart and Amy get everyone revved up with an afternoon of electric biking, but are left eating dust after some cleanliness complaints in their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Mandy host the weeks final visit at The Thorverton Arms in Devon. Their classic country pub seems to put a smile on everyones faces - until things get hairy for one pair. The hosts hope a belly-busting breakfast can swing things back in their favour

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The weeks scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old motorcyclist Michelle is rushed to AandE after crashing head first into a lamp-post, with scans revealing that she has broken bones in her neck, arm and shoulder and requires emergency surgery. Timothy, 69, arrives at St Georges after riding his bicycle into the back of a parked ambulance, while 33-year-old expectant mother Eleanor is admitted after cutting her thumb on a meat cleaver

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.desc: The air ambulance teams battle to save cyclist Grahams partially amputated leg, while Rose is freed from a rolled car in Buckinghamshire. Gary suffers a rare and extremely serious complete knee dislocation playing football, but strong pain relief results in some unexpected hilarity
