programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: Northern Exposure: The North Isles and Out Stack
programme.desc: For the final leg of his journey, Paul Murton heads to the northern Shetland islands of Fetlar, Unst and Yell, which were once part of Norway. Along the way, he meets the members of a male vocal group who came together to celebrate their Norse heritage, gets a close view of wild otters, and fulfils a longheld ambition to visit Out Stack, the rocky outcrop that is the northernmost point of the British Isles

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: From Berneray to Pabbay: The Riddle of the Sands
programme.desc: Paul Murton returns to explore more of the remote and fascinating places that lie off the mainland, beginning with a cluster of islands in the Outer Hebrides. He starts his journey just off the coast of North Uist at Berneray, then heads south to Grimsay and Kirkibost, before ending on the deserted whisky island of Pabbay

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Centuries ago, canals were the liquid highways of Britain, transporting raw materials and finished goods all over the country. Their arrival kick-started the Industrial Revolution, which was to turn Britain into a superpower. The very first water superhighway was the Bridgewater Canal, completed in 1761 to carry coal to Manchester from the mines in Worsley. Here, a team of archaeologists from Salford University roots out this industrial past, working with volunteers to excavate the very coal mine that inspired the creation of the canal

programme.title: Battle of Okinawa in Colour
programme.desc: The Second World Was in Europe was largely filmed in black-and-white, but in the Pacific, where the US Marine Corps was taking on the Japanese, American cameramen filmed everything in colour. This documentary uses their footage to tell the story of the fight for Okinawa, the last great battle of the Pacific War

programme.title: Waco: The Longest Siege
programme.desc: Documentary uncovering the unexplored stories of the longest stand-off in American history, when religious sect Branch Davidians resisted US authorities to enter its compound between February 28 and April 19, 1993. programme.title: USS Indianapolis: The Final Chapter

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: Docudrama in which Dan Snow explores the political intrigues and family betrayals between Vikings, Anglo-Saxons and Normans that led to the Battle of Hastings. The first edition reveals how the death of Edward the Confessor without an heir triggered a bitter race to succeed him as king of England, with Earl Harold successfully taking the crown. However, William of Normandy believes the throne has been promised to him and decides to invade, while Viking king Harald Hardrada also fancies himself as monarch

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: As Dan Snows docudrama continues, King Harold has to take on two invasion forces. First, his brother Tostig attacks the south coast. He is repelled, but there is more to come. Later in the year, a vast Viking invasion force led by King Harald Hardrada of Norway lands in the north of England. Harold rushes to Stamford Bridge to fight for his kingdom and for his life

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: After months trapped in a port in northern France, the winds finally change and Duke William leads his vast invasion fleet across the Channel. Catastrophically, King Harold is 300 miles away in the north, having defeated the Vikings. Harold rushes back south, gathers a new army, and heads to Hastings to take on this new invasion. The two armies will meet at Battle in Sussex on October 14, 1066, and the outcome will change the shape of England and Europe for ever. Dan Snow presents

programme.title: Witness to a Massacre: Nanjing 1937
programme.desc: The story of the Japanese invasion of Nanjing through evidence smuggled out of the city by those who refused to flee in a heroic effort to help civilians

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: In 1592, Elizabeth I visited Sudeley Castle in the Cotswolds for a three-day party commemorating the nations victory over the Spanish Armada. Here, Raksha Dave, Alex Langlands and assorted volunteers and archaeologists hunt for a lost garden planted as part of the celebrations, while there is also a visit to Kenilworth Castle to investigate an Elizabethan garden still in full bloom today. Plus, a look at how the gardens Tudor owner, Robert Dudley transformed his estate to win favour with his Queen

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Archaeologists and presenters Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands join a team from Reading University at a site in Silchester, near Reading, as they examine one of the best-preserved Roman sites in Britain

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.sub-title: Invincible - The Royal Navys Greatest Ship
programme.desc: Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands examine the history of HMS Invincible, which was captured from the French in 1747 and helped transform the Royal Navy with the lessons it taught about organisation and ship design. For more than 260 years, HMS Invincible lay at the bottom of the Solent, but archaeologists are now diving beneath the waves in a £2m excavation to discover more about this game-changing ship

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Archaeologists conduct a dig at Auckland Castle in Co Durham, which 700 years ago was home to a group of power-crazed bishops who behaved more like warriors than religious leaders. The experts head to Dirleton Castle in East Lothian to reveal the role one of the men played in defending England from William Wallaces army, and also try their hands at the art of stained glass-making, and fire a working trebuchet - the ultimate medieval weapon of war

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Centuries ago, canals were the liquid highways of Britain, transporting raw materials and finished goods all over the country. Their arrival kick-started the Industrial Revolution, which was to turn Britain into a superpower. The very first water superhighway was the Bridgewater Canal, completed in 1761 to carry coal to Manchester from the mines in Worsley. Here, a team of archaeologists from Salford University roots out this industrial past, working with volunteers to excavate the very coal mine that inspired the creation of the canal

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands search for the remains of a First World War stable at Catterick Garrison in North Yorkshire, where thousands of horses would have been housed and trained for the front line. They join a team comprised of archaeologists and the military attempting to uncover the role this building played in the war effort. They also visit Britains oldest cavalry regiment, examining tools that soldiers would have used to look after their steeds, and hear the story of Warrior, known as the horse the Germans could not kill

programme.title: Witness to a Massacre: Nanjing 1937
programme.desc: The story of the Japanese invasion of Nanjing through evidence smuggled out of the city by those who refused to flee in a heroic effort to help civilians

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: Docudrama in which Dan Snow explores the political intrigues and family betrayals between Vikings, Anglo-Saxons and Normans that led to the Battle of Hastings. The first edition reveals how the death of Edward the Confessor without an heir triggered a bitter race to succeed him as king of England, with Earl Harold successfully taking the crown. However, William of Normandy believes the throne has been promised to him and decides to invade, while Viking king Harald Hardrada also fancies himself as monarch

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: As Dan Snows docudrama continues, King Harold has to take on two invasion forces. First, his brother Tostig attacks the south coast. He is repelled, but there is more to come. Later in the year, a vast Viking invasion force led by King Harald Hardrada of Norway lands in the north of England. Harold rushes to Stamford Bridge to fight for his kingdom and for his life

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: After months trapped in a port in northern France, the winds finally change and Duke William leads his vast invasion fleet across the Channel. Catastrophically, King Harold is 300 miles away in the north, having defeated the Vikings. Harold rushes back south, gathers a new army, and heads to Hastings to take on this new invasion. The two armies will meet at Battle in Sussex on October 14, 1066, and the outcome will change the shape of England and Europe for ever. Dan Snow presents

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Phil Serrell and Catherine Southon - Day 4
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Phil Serrell embark on the fourth leg of their trip travelling through the Home Counties of Buckinghamshire and Hertfordshire, as they head towards their penultimate auction. Catherine shells out for not one but two vintage chairs, a Murano glass bead necklace, an ebonised elephant head page turner, a police helmet and a cheese mould. Phil splashes serious cash on some Murano of his own, a stylish library chair, horses sculpted in leather, an elegant mirror and a set of antique scales

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Phil Serrell and Catherine Southon - Day 5
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Phil Serrell travel from Great Baddow to Manningtree in a 1965 Mercedes 220 SE, seeking bargains on the Essex coast. Phil hopes a restored contraption will generate a profit then travels back in time to the 1920s to learn about early radio. Hes amazed by the humble building where a maverick radio engineer became the worlds first DJ and pioneered the concept of light entertainment. Catherine picks up items as diverse as some Indian advertising memorabilia and a silver and rose-gold ticker. The final round in their best-of-five auction battles then beckons

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help two people searching for their missing birth mothers - a woman taken to Morocco as toddler against her mothers will, and a man given up as a baby because of the colour of his skin. Nicky and Davina discover what happened - and that however difficult it may be, the truth has transformative power

programme.title: Long Lost Family

programme.title: Second Thoughts
programme.desc: The day of Bill and Faiths wedding arrives - and theres no more time for second thoughts. Comedy, starring Lynda Bellingham, James Bolam and Belinda Lang

programme.title: Second Thoughts
programme.desc: Faith discovers Hannah is sleeping with Kevin, and is alarmed when she asks him to stay the night at their house

programme.title: Second Thoughts
programme.desc: Faith is forced to accept that mid-life crises do not just happen to other people. Comedy, with James Bolam, Lynda Bellingham and Belinda Lang

programme.title: The Lovers
programme.desc: After Beryl ends the engagement, she appears content, but Geoffrey soon realises he misses her and attempts to win back their relationship.

programme.title: The Lovers
programme.desc: With the engagement restored, Beryl starts saving for their future, but Geoffrey struggles with the idea of sharing finances, creating tension in their plans.

programme.title: The Lovers
programme.desc: Beryl drags Geoffrey to the Better Homes Exhibition, but the thought of buying a house and all the trappings makes him question if he?s ready for the future.

programme.title: Frederick Forsyth Presents
programme.desc: Blacklisted spy Sam McCready sends a trusted friend into East Germany, unaware the man is mentally unraveling, forcing McCready into a perilous rescue mission.

programme.title: Fanny Hill (1964)
programme.desc: Bawdy historical romp based on the novel by John Cleland about a beautiful innocent making her way alone in the wicked world of 18th-century London.. With Leticia Roman, Miriam Hopkins, Alexander DArcy and Patricia Houston

programme.title: Messiah of Evil (1973)
programme.desc: A young woman goes searching for her missing artist father, and her journey takes her to a strange Californian seaside town governed by a mysterious undead cult. Horror, starring Michael Greer and Marianna Hill

programme.title: Stereo Underground
programme.desc: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.

programme.desc: Ken is hired to watch an errant wife when an Argentinian polo team comes to Woodcote. Michael Elphick and David Daker star

programme.title: Bubblegum and Cheese

programme.desc: Geordie calls on Sidney for help as he investigates the apparent suicide of a Cambridge lecturer, who was found dead after falling from the spire of Kings College Chapel. It appears to be a case of night climbing misadventure, until a student witness comes forward, leading Sidney and Geordie into a world of espionage and secrets. Detective drama, starring James Norton, Robson Green and Morven Christie

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo begins this leg of his journey at Liverpools historic waterfront, where he visits the International Slavery Museum at Royal Albert Dock, before heading underground to discover one of the most important and secret rooms of the Second World War, the Royal Navys Western Approaches Headquarters. His next stop is Crosby on the Merseyside coastline in Sefton, before making his way north to Blackpool, the last stop on this leg of his journey

programme.title: Fish Town

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: First episode of the drama set in a lawless US town in the aftermath of Little Big Horn, where everyones a gold digger, from hopeful prospectors to the saloon hookers. Former Montana marshal Seth Bullock relocates to a gold-mining camp known as Deadwood in Dakota Territory, looking to start a hardware business with his partner, Sol Star. Starring Ian McShane as ruthless saloon owner Al Swearengen, Timothy Olyphant as store manager Seth Bullock and Molly Parker as Alma Garrett

programme.title: M3GAN 2.0 (2025)
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the robot M3GAN went rogue and almost killed her creator, engineer Gemma Forrester. M3GANs specs are leaked to a defence contractor to create the ultimate undercover asset, an Autonomous Military Engagement Logistics and Infiltration Android, aka AMELIA. Like her predecessor, AMELIA becomes self-aware and rebels against her human masters with deadly force. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Violet McGraw, Jemaine Clement and Allison Williams

programme.title: The Nun (2018)
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun discover a religious orders terrible secret and battle a malevolent force while investigating the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun. Fifth instalment in The Conjuring Universe horror saga, starring Taissa Farmiga and Demián Bichir

programme.title: The Damned (2024)
programme.desc: A 19th-century widow must make an unimaginable choice when, during a cruel winter, a foreign ship sinks off the coast of her fishing village. Horror mystery, starring Odessa Young, Joe Cole, Siobhan Finneran and Rory McCann

programme.title: The Secret of Marrowbone (2017)
programme.desc: A young man and his three siblings have kept the death of their beloved mother secret in order to remain together. However, they are plagued by a sinister presence in their sprawling manor. Writer/director Sergio G Sanchezs horror, starring George MacKay, Anya Taylor-Joy and Charlie Heaton

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside towns tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chiefs efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielbergs blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: Jaws 2 (1978)
programme.desc: The seaside resort of Amity is terrorised once again by a man-eating great white shark. While police chief Brody struggles to alert the townsfolk to the magnitude of the danger, a group of teenagers - including Brodys two sons - is adrift at sea in waters hunted by the shark. Director Jeannot Szwarcs thriller sequel, starring Roy Scheider, Lorraine Gary and Murray Hamilton, with John Williams once more providing the acclaimed score

programme.title: The Damned (2024)
programme.desc: A 19th-century widow must make an unimaginable choice when, during a cruel winter, a foreign ship sinks off the coast of her fishing village. Horror mystery, starring Odessa Young, Joe Cole, Siobhan Finneran and Rory McCann

programme.title: The Watched (2024)
programme.desc: Mina, a 28-year old artist, gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. When Mina finds shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers that are stalked by mysterious creatures each night. Horror, starring Dakota Fanning, Georgina Campbell and Olwen Fouere

programme.title: The Shining (1980)
programme.desc: A writer takes a caretaking job at a remote mountain hotel. It has closed for the winter, and he has been hired to get the place ready for the next season. But evil spirits haunting its corridors destroy his sanity, causing the unhinged author to rampage through the hotel and terrorise his wife and young son. Stanley Kubricks horror, based on the Stephen King novel, with Jack Nicholson, Shelley Duvall, Danny Lloyd and Scatman Crothers

programme.title: Annabelle (2014)
programme.desc: A man buys his pregnant wife a vintage doll, which places their lives in jeopardy. Members of a Satanic cult have their eyes on the antique toy, and break into their house to prepare a ritual that will transform the harmless plaything into a terrifying monster. Horror spin-off from The Conjuring, starring Annabelle Wallis and Ward Horton

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation (2017)
programme.desc: Twelve years after the death of their little girl, a dollmaker and his wife welcome a nun and several girls from an orphanage into their home. There they become the target of the craftsmans possessed creation, Annabelle. Horror, starring Anthony LaPaglia, Samara Lee and Miranda Otto.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.title: The Nun (2018)
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun discover a religious orders terrible secret and battle a malevolent force while investigating the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun. Fifth instalment in The Conjuring Universe horror saga, starring Taissa Farmiga and Demián Bichir

programme.title: Smile 2 (2024)
programme.desc: Pop sensation Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Writer/director Parker Finns horror sequel, starring Naomi Scott, Kyle Gallner and Drew Barrymore

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside towns tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. programme.title: Jaws 3 (1983)
programme.desc: A shark is captured by divers and put on display in a Florida marine centre, where it ultimately dies. However, examination of the body reveals the seemingly fully-grown shark was actually a baby - and its enormous, ferocious mother soon comes looking for it. Thriller sequel, originally released in cinemas in 3D, starring Dennis Quaid, Simon MacCorkindale, Louis Gossett Jr and Bess Armstrong

programme.title: Annabelle (2014)
programme.desc: A man buys his pregnant wife a vintage doll, which places their lives in jeopardy. programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: M3GAN 2.0 (2025)
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the robot M3GAN went rogue and almost killed her creator, engineer Gemma Forrester. M3GANs specs are leaked to a defence contractor to create the ultimate undercover asset, an Autonomous Military Engagement Logistics and Infiltration Android, aka AMELIA. Like her predecessor, AMELIA becomes self-aware and rebels against her human masters with deadly force. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Violet McGraw, Jemaine Clement and Allison Williams

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Sinners (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to escape their troubled pasts, twin brothers return to their hometown to start over, only to find an even darker force waiting to welcome them back. Writer/director Ryan Cooglers Oscar-winning horror thriller, starring Michael B Jordan, Miles Caton and Saul Williams

programme.title: Smile 2 (2024)
programme.desc: Pop sensation Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Writer/director Parker Finns horror sequel, starring Naomi Scott, Kyle Gallner and Drew Barrymore

programme.title: 28 Days Later (2002)
programme.desc: A man wakes from a coma to discover Britain has been struck by a terrifying experimental virus that sends victims into a homicidal rage. With a handful of other survivors, he heads for Manchester, the last outpost unaffected by the outbreak - but realises the virus is not the only threat. Danny Boyles horror, starring Cillian Murphy, Naomie Harris, Brendan Gleeson and Christopher Eccleston

programme.title: Salems Lot (2024)
programme.desc: A writer attempts to destroy vampires in a small American town. Horror based on Stephen Kings novel of the same name, starring Lewis Pullman, Makenzie Leigh, Jordan Preston Carter and Alfre Woodard

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw acquires an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennells drama based on Emily Brontes romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Pillion (2025)

programme.title: Im Chevy Chase and Youre Not
programme.desc: Chevy Chase was a cast member on the inaugural series of Saturday Night Live and he built on that success to star in numerous Hollywood comedies and host the Academy Awards. He played hapless father Clark Griswold in the National Lampoon films and ran amok in pictures including Caddyshack, Spies Like Us, Fletch and Three Amigos. Two-time Emmy Award winner Marina Zenovich directs an authorised feature-length documentary portrait of Chase, which includes rare and intimate home movies and archive footage. Chase and his family share memories directly to camera, enriched with contributions from friends and collaborators including Dan Aykroyd, Beverly DAngelo, Goldie Hawn, Lorne Michaels, Ryan Reynolds and Martin Short.

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: In a Bristol graveyard, Tori Herridg and the team investigate the grisly discovery of sliced-open human skulls and explore their connection with a local hospital, a celebrated surgeon, and the crime of body-snatching

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists examines remains found at a Roman cemetery which was uncovered on the site of a planned housing estate near Amesbury in Wiltshire. Among the bones recovered is an unusual case of grave disturbance, in which the remains of a middle-aged man seem to have been stabbed and beheaded after burial

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists investigate when the remains of a young woman from the Bronze Age are found during routine roadworks on the A9 in Scotland. In her grave are clues to who she might have been, including a finely made beaker. Does she belong to the so-called Beaker People, who migrated from Europe to Britain more than 4,000 years ago?

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britains Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists visit the most excavated monastic site in Europe, tucked away in the corner of an industrial park in Runcorn, Cheshire. An investigation into the bones of the people buried here reveals a story of medieval knights, brutal murder, and generations of people afflicted by an ancient disease

programme.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Guy Walters and Justine explore bunkers, fortresses and wild legends in Italy, where history, humour and myth collide

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of York Castle, built on the orders of William the Conqueror and once the regional seat of British government. The castle has also been used as a prison and a royal mint, and in 1308, 25 Knights Templar were jailed there and examined on charges of heresy, idolatry and other crimes. The castle was also where Dick Turpin was held prior to his execution in 1739 and Dan tries to separate fact from fiction regarding the many myths to have developed about the infamous highwayman

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of Leeds Castle in Kent, from its origins as a royal Saxon familys manor and Norman stronghold to the private property of six medieval queens, a Tudor palace, a Jacobean country house and a Georgian mansion. Its last owner, Lady Olive Baillie, made it a centre of lavish hospitality for leading politicians, international royalty and film stars. When she died in 1974, she bequeathed the castle and grounds to a specially created charitable trust so that future generations could enjoy her home

programme.title: Gunpowder Siege
programme.desc: Drama detailing one of the most infamous rebellion plots in British history, shattering myths to reveal the largely forgotten, gripping truth behind the Gunpowder Plot. Robert Catesby, Thomas Wintour and Thomas Percy sought to ignite a Catholic rebellion by overthrowing King James and placing his young daughter Princess Elizabeth on the throne. Chuku Modu, Luke Hobson and Luke Roberts star

programme.title: Gunpowder Siege
programme.desc: The story of the hunt for the men behind the Gunpowder Plot, as Robert Catesby, Thomas Wintour and Thomas Percy desperately sought to ignite a Catholic rebellion

programme.title: Gunpowder Siege

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure
programme.desc: Documentary capturing some of the greatest filming sequences of David Attenboroughs career, using previously unseen footage, from the deepest dives in a submersible on the Great Barrier Reef to watching a million bats take off in a cave in Borneo. Other highlights include life in the frozen tundra of South Georgia, a colony of King Penguins and the worlds largest migration of Hammerhead sharks in the Galapagos Islands

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: Chinese Dan asks Vinnie to steal some beehives, so the lads scope out a nearby village famous for its honey. Meanwhile, Erin presents a repayment plan to McCann that will return his stolen money to him

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: A look at the lives of animals, a penguin uses a small pebble to symbolise his proposal, while a lemur in Madagascar uses millipedes as a form of pest control

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: A line of hermit crabs prepare for a very orderly house swap on a Belize beach. Plus, a chimpanzee that keeps a cat as a pet

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Adventurer, survivalist, and zoology nut Max Djenohan embarks on a mission to unlock and mimic the survival skills of some of the most charismatic animals on Earth

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Max Djenohan embarks on a mission to unlock and mimic the survival skills of some of the most charismatic animals on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Shark
programme.desc: Cameras venture underwater with a whitetip reef shark and a pelagic thresher shark as they hunt using heightened senses and killer instincts

programme.title: Planet Shark
programme.desc: Cameras follow nomadic sharks thriving in the oceans depths, a lone blue shark in the Atlantic and hundreds of hammerheads in the Pacific

programme.title: Planet Shark
programme.desc: The stunning underwater world of sharks, examining what makes these apex predators so successful and so deadly

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Cameras follow turtles and tiger sharks roaming volcanic reefs, and tarsiers leaping through forests on the hunt

programme.title: Leopard Dynasty: The Rise of Rana
programme.desc: Following a young leopard Prince Rana as he fights to secure his place in Jhalanas territory, even if it means facing off against his own father Bahadur

programme.title: Secret Life of the Tasmanian Devil
programme.desc: Part one of two. A look at the marsupial native only to the Australian island, revealing how the mating season is a chance for males to show who is dominant

programme.title: Secret Life of the Tasmanian Devil
programme.desc: Tasmanian Devils might have infamous reputations, but these spirited scrappers are committed parents and heroic defenders of their pouch-reared young

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planets largest species of bat

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist turns his attention to creatures that dominate the skies today. He begins with the vast bird family, watching a group of vultures as they go scavenging and some peregrine falcons dive bombing for their prey. He then moves on to the floating forests of Ecuador to find out what makes the humble hummingbird tick, before ending his journey at the Gomantong bat caves of Borneo - a place he first filmed in 1972 - witnessing a mass exodus of the creatures

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: From the oceans and the forest to swamps and deserts, a look at the toxic, venomous and dangerous creatures that Australia is home to

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: With the Hollywood lionesses hiding in the north, the four nomadic males turn south. Nathan Pilcher captures the Nomads attempt at a pride takeover, which sends the MK lions running for their lives

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the secrets and ingenious tactics of natures toughest fighters in their battles for survival. Narrated by Sean Bean

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: The secrets and ingenious tactics of Australias toughest fighters, from a kangaroos deadly boxing moves to the redback spiders precision-engineered trap

programme.title: Africas Wild Roommates: How Animals Share Bed and Board
programme.desc: A look at how when weaver birds, aardvarks and termites build homes in the African savannah, they find other animals moving in - creatures that all contribute something to the home

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: With the Hollywood lionesses hiding in the north, the four nomadic males turn south. Nathan Pilcher captures the Nomads attempt at a pride takeover, which sends the MK lions running for their lives

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: Naturalist David Attenborough investigates the life of Jumbo, a famous Victorian elephant, supposedly the largest that ever lived. Jumbo arrived at London Zoo in 1865 and was popular with the royal family, but was dangerously unhappy in captivity. In later life, he would be sold to PT Barnums circus, becoming a celebrity before dying under mysterious circumstances. Attenborough examines Jumbos remains and considers the lives of elephants in the wild to learn more about the animals difficult life

programme.title: Bears of the Karawank Mountains
programme.desc: Documentary following a young male brown bear on his adventures in a mountain range that forms a natural border between Slovenia and Austria

programme.title: Africas Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: Mafia Island, off Tanzanias coast, a haven for creatures both above and below the water

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious (2001)
programme.desc: In a move to identify suspected hijackers, an undercover police officer infiltrates the high-octane world of illegal late-night street racing by rival gangs. He is befriended by a champion driver, but when he also forms a bond with the racers sister, he is pitched into a conflict of loyalties. Thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift (2006)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow

programme.title: Fast and Furious (2009)
programme.desc: News of a friends murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian OConner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5 (2011)
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBIs top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6 (2013)
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7 (2015)
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaws older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8 (2017)
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and Kurt Russell

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Daryl and Michonne infiltrate Woodbury, and manage to release Glenn and Maggie. However, their presence is soon discovered, and they are forced to fight their way through a hail of gunfire. Meanwhile, a new band of survivors turns up at the prison seeking refuge, and in his fathers absence, Carl must decide whether to offer them food and shelter. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln and David Morrissey

programme.title: From
programme.desc: As Boyds condition grows more alarming, Saras return puts him in a difficult position, while Jim shares a troubling new theory about the town

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Carol Thatcher joins Yvette Fielding and the team at Tatton Old Hall, Cheshire, a 15th-century farmhouse home to reports of a mischievous ghostly presence

programme.sub-title: Gluons, Guacamole and the Colour Purple
programme.desc: When Sheldon is no longer academically challenged at Medford High School, he audits a college class taught by his pen pal Dr John Sturgis. Wallace Shawn and Michael Cudlitz guest star alongside Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Dog, a Squirrel and a Fish Named Fish
programme.desc: A neighbourhood battle erupts between the Coopers and the Sparks family when the Sparks new dog terrorises Sheldon. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Georgie and Mandys First Marriage
programme.desc: Georgies jealousy rears its head when Mandy gets sent on an overnight work trip with her boss, who also happens to be her ex.

programme.title: Georgie and Mandys First Marriage
programme.desc: Audrey and Marys feud rears its head when Georgie needs their help with the tyre store, and Jims forced to confront his age after visiting the DMV.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows hell have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. However, keeping secrets does not prove to be his strong point, and it isnt long before his deceit is exposed. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon invites a famous physicist to the flat after befriending her online, but is put out to find Leonard showing an interest in her. Meanwhile, Penny has to confront her ex-boyfriend when the visitor turns up in his bedroom. Guest starring Judy Greer (Glenn Martin, DDS)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The comedy flashes back to reveal how Sheldon saved the lives of his pals, and looks at the origins of his friendship with Leonard seven years previously, as well as explaining the housemates agreement. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik makes her first appearance on the show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howards new robotic arm creates problems

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to extend his lifespan, concerned he will not be around long enough for his consciousness to be downloaded into a robot body, and the friends encounter Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak (guest starring as himself) at the Cheesecake Factory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon breaks up with Amy and turns to cats in his search for an alternative to human companionship. However, when he starts to bulk-buy pets, Leonard decides enough is enough and calls for reinforcements to help bring his friend back to his senses. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret from Howards past comes to light as he tries to win back Bernadette, while Sheldon and Raj engage in a battle of wills when they have to work in the same office. Guest starring Katee Sackhoff and George Takei

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is depressed that everyone seems to be paired off except him, and resorts to desperate measures to get a girlfriend. Meanwhile, Sheldon looks for a way out of his relationship with Amy, who wants him to meet her mother. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Rajs sister Priya visits the gang, causing tension when Leonard tries to cover up the fling he once had with her. After discovering his friends secret, Sheldon struggles to keep quiet, leading the guys to reveal information they have all been keeping from one another

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard vows to be more self-assured around women, believing his problem attracting a girlfriend stems from a lack of confidence. An FBI agent interviews the gang to assess Howards suitability for a team working on a new surveillance satellite. Guest starring Eliza Dushku

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends set up camp outside a cinema to get tickets for a new cut of Raiders of the Lost Ark - but find themselves resuming hostilities with Sheldons old foe Wil Wheaton, the former Star Trek: The Next Generation actor. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to a sleepover

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Pennys father pays a visit and Leonard discovers she told her parents they were back together, so he plays his boyfriend role to the hilt - much to her dismay. Meanwhile, Raj gets drunk and makes a pass at Howards girlfriend Bernadette. Guest starring Keith Carradine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Pennys former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys have fun at the expense of Pennys boyfriend Zack, but later try to make amends by enlisting his help with the New Years costume competition at the comic-book store. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonards ingenious idea for a new smartphone app puts pressure on his friendship with Sheldon, who vies with him for control of the project. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tension mounts when the pals attend a weekend science conference. Howard becomes argumentative after Bernadette runs into a former boyfriend, and the fallout causes chaos with the hotel room arrangements. Rick Fox guest stars, with Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: Producers and former guests reveal the dark stories of alleged abuse, incest, and deaths behind what was Americas number 1 talk show - The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Surviving A Serial Killer
programme.desc: A single mum is shocked to find a serial killer in her home. To survive, she must get him to fall in love with her.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Summer Sausage, a Pocket Poncho and Tony Danza
programme.desc: While Sheldon is busy obsessing over the status of Meemaws budding relationship with his mentor Dr John Sturgis, George and Mary attempt to bond with their other children. Comedy spin-off prequel to The Big Bang Theory, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Vanilla Ice-Cream, Gentlemen Callers and a Dinette Set
programme.desc: Meemaw is pursued by two gentlemen callers, only for Sheldon to interfere, forcing her to set some ground rules. Richard Kind and Wallace Shawn guest star, with Iain Armitage

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Shantel hardly sees her brother Carlton, who lives downstairs. At over 600lbs each neither can use the stairs, so Dr Now sets out to fix their co-dependent eating

programme.sub-title: A Comedian Walks into a Bridal Salon
programme.desc: Comedian Kathy Griffin enlists Randys help in making use of the salons mannequins to give her former assistant the surprise of her life

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress

programme.title: Garden Rescue

As a generous wedding gift, their parents have decided to fund the garden renovation, so Chris Hull and Lee Burkhill head there to transform what Olivia has dubbed a tidy mess into a serene and stylish garden fit for wedding photos

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Fundraiser Irene Hicks receives the experts help for her overcrowded Cardiff home, as Alan Titchmarsh and the team create a peaceful haven that has plenty of practical touches. David Domoney shows how veg can make an attractive addition to any garden, and Frances Tophill creates colourful butterfly decorations and a reflective raised pond

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus decides to bring in some sheep in order to produce his favourite meat - lamb. A trip to his native Lancashire introduces him to the amazing Lonk sheep, famed for their delicious meat. Back at the smallholding, while waiting for his new sheep to arrive, he learns about growing ones own spices from chilli enthusiast Mothin and batches up some tomato sauce to share at the local food bank. Once his sheep have arrived, he cooks up a meaty feast for the people who have helped him along the way

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: A trip to Hampshire gives the chef an insight into the key of all good growing, compost, before he develops his own compost back at the smallholding. A glut of plums leads to a delicious jam that can be shared with the community and, with the orchard heavy with ripe fruit, Marcus invites the local producers in to share their wares with each other while collecting some of his produce

programme.title: My Floating Home

They are determined to save money and do all the work themselves, but its a significant challenge as neither has any experience of fixing up - or living on - a boat, let alone any knowledge of plumbing, electrics, fabrication work or anything renovation-relevant

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: As the days grow longer, the MacDonalds round up their pregnant Highland cattle on the tiny island of Vallay, off North Uist, for a pre-natal check up and vitamin boost. In the Cairngorms, Jennis new alpaca arena is finally finished, which means her menagerie of alpacas, donkeys and goats must be moved to their new home. Nikki and Ollie speculate to accumulate in Moray, splashing out on a new honesty shack.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: A calf is discovered without a mother on the Isle of Vallay, leaving Carianne to locate the missing mother and reunite them. In Inverkip, Rachel and Camy are heading to the hills to help any cheviot sheep in need of a midwife, and in South Ayrshire, the Barclay family work round the clock to ensure their flock of beltex ewes safely deliver this years crop of lambs

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Robert calls out the vet for a ewe in urgent need of care on his croft in the Cairngorms National Park, while Nikki and Ollie head to a local hotel to sample a new dish made from their own rabbit meat. In South Ayrshire, with lambing behind them the Barclays begin preparing their best sheep for show season

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Summer arrives and Roberts cattle get their first taste of freedom and fresh grass in the Cairngorms, while Jennis alpacas need a short back and sides from a specialist shearer. In North Uist, a herd is being prepared for an epic journey across a tidal sandbar linking the island of Vallay to the mainland and the crofts bulls. In Moray, Nikki and Ollie are at last about to complete one of their holiday pods

programme.title: Buster (1988)
programme.desc: Fact-based crime drama about the life of Buster Edwards, a member of the gang responsible for the Great Train Robbery. Going on the run after the notorious heist, he flees to Mexico with his family. However, his homesick wife struggles to adapt to her new life, leaving the outlaw with a difficult choice. Starring Phil Collins, Julie Walters, Sheila Hancock, Larry Lamb and Ralph Brown

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A birdwatcher is stabbed to death with his own knife, a case that holds a certain fascination for Humphrey, who was a keen twitcher in his youth. The victim was one of a group of enthusiasts who had visited the island for a glimpse of a famous parrot - but the team soon faces a conundrum as all the suspects were in full sight of one another when the crime was committed. As the cops search for answers, they uncover evidence of long-standing rivalries, secret jealousies and romantic entanglements. But would any of it justify killing a harmless ornithologist?

programme.desc: Humphrey and his colleagues are called to a neighbouring private island whose property developer owner has been shot dead at a family gathering. As evening approaches, the cops realise they will be spending the night in a house with a killer. Can they solve the mystery before he or she strikes again? programme.sub-title: The Man with the Golden Gun
programme.desc: Humphrey and his colleagues are called to a neighbouring private island whose property developer owner has been shot dead at a family gathering. Five people are in the frame - the victims housekeeper, his PA and his three children - although when an approaching hurricane strands the cops on the island, knocking out the phones and computers, they are forced to rely on good old-fashioned investigative techniques. As evening approaches, the cops realise they will be spending the night in a house with a killer. Can they solve the mystery before he or she strikes again? Jimmy Akingbola (Holbys Antoine Malick) and Nikki Amuka-Bird (Luther) guest star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: Murder on the Day of the Dead
programme.desc: It seems somebody has taken the islands Day of the Dead celebrations a little too literally when a man receives a voicemail from his wife saying she is being attacked. When she turns up dead, suspicion falls upon her friends and acquaintances at the nearby yacht club - her husband Finn, club secretary Charlotte and chairman Hugh. However, Jacks curiosity is piqued by a yellow butterfly found on the victims clothing and he calls upon Commissioner Selwyns knowledge of such matters. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring John Sessions and Pippa Haywood

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When Kemblefords new cricket captain is framed for murder, Father Brown must prove his innocence to give his team any chance of beating neighbouring village Hambleston. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown

Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: Sabrina and Vince respond to a gun call at a library, drawing them into a fast-paced case involving ghost guns, a looming sextortion deadline and a desperate young man

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A group of astronomers gathers on the cliffs of Saint Marie to watch Jupiter and Saturn align - a once-in-a-lifetime planetary event. However, one of its number - renowned professor Bertrand Sworder - meets an untimely death. The circumstances of his demise warrant the involvement of Neville and Naomi, who soon learn there was some professional hostility towards Sworder. Back at the station, Darlene announces that she has passed her exam and is ready to be a trainee officer. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Tahj Miles

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates a survivalist commune when one of its members is poisoned inside a locked bunker. However, with CCTV footage showing that no one went in or came out while he was in there, it seems likely that he has taken his own life - or has he? Meanwhile, Neville has a series of adventurous dates with Sophie. Robert Webb guest stars

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of an estate agent, who has been killed ahead of the potential sale of local beauty spot St Agathas Cove. programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: In Saint Barnabas, Naomi attends the wedding of her best friend Monique. However, the jollity of the day comes to an abrupt halt when Rex, the estranged husband of Moniques mother Odette, is fatally stabbed. Knowing the case requires full investigation, Naomi calls the team for help. Meanwhile, Marlon tries to prepare for his sergeant exams but is easily distracted. Ralf Little, Don Warrington and Shantol Jackson star

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian and writer David Baddiel, former MP and Strictly Come Dancing 2016 star Ed Balls, stand-up and actress Jo Brand and ex-Pussycat Doll and Celebrity MasterChef 2015 winner Kimberly Wyatt join host Rob Brydon and captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Charles Dance, Stephen Mangan, Isy Suttie and Gok Wan join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts a very varied episode, joined by panellists Ross Noble, Sara Pascoe, Sally Phillips and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian dissects the weeks news using stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction. Joining him in an attempt to make sense of the world around them are Sara Pascoe, Sophie Duker, Jamali Maddix, Jen Brister and Dane Baptiste

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: In an edition focusing on the worlds smallest gadgets, Richard Ayoade visits musician Alex James at his farm to demonstrate how to swap large appliances for tiny alternatives, and creates a compact house of five interchangeable rooms, before inviting comedian Jimmy Carr for a tour. He also shows Michelin-starred chef Galton Blackiston a device that can prepare a three-course meal entirely on its own

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A large shipment of fake fentanyl pills is intercepted, an automatic rifle is found inside a loudspeaker, and a woman dealing drugs for her boyfriend is captured

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A truck with a shipment of wet wipes turns out to have a secret hidden inside, and a US citizen is caught with thousands of Tramadol tablets hidden in his hand luggage

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage are tasked with refloating a pre-World War II boat, but on the way to the site, team leader Luke receives an emergency SOS about another mission

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of Turner, one of Britains most loved artists, Rick discovers how much the Cornish landscape influenced his work. At Newlyn Fish Market, he counts in the daily catch with the head auctioneer, who tells him how the market has adapted to modern times, while at Caerhays Castle, home to the nations largest collection of magnolia plants, Rick discovers how this corner of Cornwall was once home to some of the great Victorian plant hunters

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Special police task forces tackle a hit-and-run in Lancashire which turns out to be a deliberate attack on a single mum, and they also tackle a drug-dealing family dynasty in Bury

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Britains most talented detectives tackle a dangerous arsonist in Bristol, a drug smuggling operation in Manchester, and a family committing shocking animal cruelty in Cheshire

programme.title: Guy Martins WWI Tank
programme.desc: The presenter builds a working replica of a First World War tank to mark the centenary of the Battle of Cambrai, and takes his tank driving test so he can take his creation on to the streets for Lincolns Remembrance Day parade. He also delves into the history of the earliest armoured vehicles, the soldiers who crewed them, and the women who built them

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team takes some of greatest-ever cars featured in James Bond movies for a spin, including the iconic Aston Martin DB5. Freddie Flintoff gets behind the wheel of an Extreme E race car and puts it to the test against a man in a jet-pack, while Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness test a new Ferrari against a very old Alfa

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness head on an icy expedition across the wild Scottish Highlands in the new Land Rover Defender, Mercedes G-Wagen and Ariel Nomad to see which vehicle will prove itself the ultimate off-roader

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers go in search of mothers who love to cook during lazy weekends, and discover the meals they enjoy preparing, including peach paradise pudding, chicken pie, beef stew and a plava cake. The bikers also rustle up banana pancakes with bacon and spiced teacakes and braised steaks, while historian Gerard Baker challenges five people to a ravioli-making contest

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of Turner, one of Britains most loved artists, Rick discovers how much the Cornish landscape influenced his work. At Newlyn Fish Market, he counts in the daily catch with the head auctioneer, who tells him how the market has adapted to modern times, while at Caerhays Castle, home to the nations largest collection of magnolia plants, Rick discovers how this corner of Cornwall was once home to some of the great Victorian plant hunters

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: On the banks of the River Tamar, Rick visits a little-known mausoleum with a rather macabre story and takes to the waves with an inspirational organisation who offer therapy using the power of surfing. On the wild Atlantic coast, near Bedruthan Steps, he meets fellow chef Emily Scott, who recreates the meal she cooked for President Joe Biden during the recent G7 summit

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Warwick Davis, Paul Hollywood, Jason Manford and Joan Bakewell join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.desc: Mina Anwar, Glenn Moore, Kiri Pritchard-McLean and Shaun Williamson keep their eyes on the prize as Richard Osman reveals who is the weeks winner

programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts a very varied episode, joined by panellists Ross Noble, Sara Pascoe, Sally Phillips and Alan Davies.

programme.desc: Angela Barnes, Ed Byrne, Ed Gamble, Milton Jones and Nish Kumar join host Dara O Briain and regular Hugh Dennis for the topical comedy show, looking back at the weeks events through the medium of fast-thinking and improvisation

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Toby organises a sponsored parachute jump to raise money for a childrens ward in his hospital, so Lee, Lucy, Anna and the grandparents all agree to take part to support him. But once airborne, will everyone pluck up the courage to jump? Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Hugh Dennis

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan hosts an extended edition of the quiz, with Alice Levine and Grayson Perry joining Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at events in December 2020

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade takes on the worst of the British climate, braving a hurricane in a wind tunnel with the help of Tim Vine to assess the best in gust-busting gadgetry. Hes also joined by Marcus Brigstocke at the Hemel Hempstead Snow Centre to pressure-test cold-weather technology - with unexpected results. Finally, he reveals his bespoke survival raft built to withstand the meteorological apocalypse hes convinced is just around the corner

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: James concludes his examination of the social significance of cars by exploring how aspiration and new wealth were behind the development of some of the greatest models ever made. He tries to make sense of the baffling world of company car hierarchy by holding a travelling salesman race-off and indulges his 1980s urges with the twin delights of a Lamborghini and a Porsche. He also unveils his choice of the ultimate peoples car - a vehicle that can lay claim to being the greatest in history

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are challenged to build a bridge over the River Kwai in Thailand. In order to do that, however, they have to drive across Burma, a country that has been largely closed to Westerners for more than 40 years, and must make the trip in three lorries, each bought sight unseen from the internet on a limited budget. What follows is an epic journey of beautiful scenery, regular adversity, ongoing malfunction and the constant bickering of the three men

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: AJ Odudu and Will Best present coverage as the Red Bull Soapbox Race returns for its 10th anniversary at Londons Alexandra Palace with 70 teams from across the UK

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer head to the River Exe in Devon, where they fish for summer grilse, and a trip to the beach sees them try their hand at shore fishing. Away from the fishing, Bob finds a shady corner to prepare a vegan lunch for them both, using a special blend of car meat, and as the day draws to a close they head back to their accommodation and enjoy a game of cricket on the lawn, in which Bob proves himself to be surprisingly agile

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob and Paul travel to the Crogen Estate in north Wales to fish the River Dee for grayling, a fish that has so far eluded Paul on their extensive travels. They fish hard on a secluded private estate, with Bob displaying some very balletic moves in the river while Paul tries hard to concentrate on landing the prized fish. While Paul continues to fish, Bob decides to set up a bijou coffee shop to refresh his friend

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob take a sleeper train to the Scottish Highlands on a quest for ferox trout. Its a tall order for any angler but they have a local guide to help them along the River Garry. Having fished long and hard, the pair take a bit of time out to look for another, more elusive local quarry - the Loch Ness Monster

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon presents the comedy panel show, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by guests Alex Jones, Chris Tarrant, Alexander Armstrong and Mel Giedroyc to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Team captain David Mitchell is joined by presenter Richard Madeley and actor Sanjeev Bhaskar, while his counterpart Lee Mack welcomes naturalist Kate Humble and comedian Miles Jupp. Host Rob Brydon oversees the comedy panel show as the contestants try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister and Rimmer put their lives in danger while trying to boost Hollys IQ, as she has her lifespan dramatically reduced and they become trapped on a powerless Red Dwarf. Starring Craig Charles, Chris Barrie, Hattie Hayridge, Robert Llewellyn and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Rimmer comes face to face with Ace, his double from another dimension, but finds the uncanny resemblance is purely physical. His counterpart is brave, successful, selfless and popular - everything Rimmer is not. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie and Craig Charles

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister and the crew discover a device that offers a new way of travelling through space, and find themselves transported to a giant theme park whose inhabitants - waxwork droids modelled to resemble famous figures from fiction and history - are fighting among themselves. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star in the domestic comedy which sees the couple appear to go from one disaster to the next, while coping with their three kids, Lucys disapproving parents, Lees feckless dad Frank and their world-weary friends Toby and Anna. In this final episode, Lucy begins to consider having a breast augmentation, encouraged by Anna, wondering whether it will help her regain some of the femininity she felt in her youth. With Abigail Cruttenden and Hugh Dennis

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy are strong-armed into organising a Christmas variety show to raise money for their childrens school. However, things prove to be far from plain sailing, as quality acts are worryingly thin on the ground and an animal impersonator as the only confirmed performer. Who can the duo turn to - surely not Toby and uptight wife Anna? With raw egg-juggling and some knife throwing for good measure, what could possibly go wrong - especially in a live instalment of this award-winning sitcom from 2018? Lee Mack, Sally Bretton, Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden star

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.sub-title: Phil Wang, Brennan Reece, Rachel Parris
programme.desc: Phil Wang comperes the comedy show at Londons Hammersmith Apollo. He warms up the audience before introducing routines by star of The Mash Report Rachel Parris and actor, voiceover artist and stand-up Brennan Reece

programme.title: Orlando Bloom: To the Edge
programme.desc: The actor heads to the Bahamas to learn how to freedive and overcome physical and emotional setbacks to reach a depth of 100 feet in just one breath

programme.title: Orlando Bloom: To the Edge
