programme.desc: The comedian dissects the weeks news using stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction. Joining him in an attempt to make sense of the world around them are Miles Jupp, Jamali Maddix and Kiri Pritchard-McLean

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Angela Barnes, Ed Byrne, Ed Gamble, Milton Jones and Nish Kumar join host Dara O Briain and regular Hugh Dennis for the topical comedy show, looking back at the weeks events through the medium of fast-thinking and improvisation

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show from 2016, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Richard Osman, Tom Courtenay, Sara Pascoe and Chris Kamara. As usual, all participants will be hoping to deceive one another with plausible lies, such as Richard stating he has never seen Breaking Bad because of his Homes Under the Hammer addiction, Sir Tom claiming he enjoys whiskey on his Christmas morning cornflakes, and Chris explaining that his full name is actually Christmas Kamara. The team also presents a somewhat unusual take on the Nativity

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Charles Dance, Stephen Mangan, Isy Suttie and Gok Wan join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts a very varied episode, joined by panellists Ross Noble, Sara Pascoe, Sally Phillips and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian dissects the weeks news using stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction. Joining him in an attempt to make sense of the world around them are Sara Pascoe, Sophie Duker, Jamali Maddix, Jen Brister and Dane Baptiste

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: In an edition focusing on the worlds smallest gadgets, Richard Ayoade visits musician Alex James at his farm to demonstrate how to swap large appliances for tiny alternatives, and creates a compact house of five interchangeable rooms, before inviting comedian Jimmy Carr for a tour. He also shows Michelin-starred chef Galton Blackiston a device that can prepare a three-course meal entirely on its own

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A large shipment of fake fentanyl pills is intercepted, an automatic rifle is found inside a loudspeaker, and a woman dealing drugs for her boyfriend is captured

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A truck with a shipment of wet wipes turns out to have a secret hidden inside, and a US citizen is caught with thousands of Tramadol tablets hidden in his hand luggage

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage are tasked with refloating a pre-World War II boat, but on the way to the site, team leader Luke receives an emergency SOS about another mission

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of Turner, one of Britains most loved artists, Rick discovers how much the Cornish landscape influenced his work. At Newlyn Fish Market, he counts in the daily catch with the head auctioneer, who tells him how the market has adapted to modern times, while at Caerhays Castle, home to the nations largest collection of magnolia plants, Rick discovers how this corner of Cornwall was once home to some of the great Victorian plant hunters

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Special police task forces tackle a hit-and-run in Lancashire which turns out to be a deliberate attack on a single mum, and they also tackle a drug-dealing family dynasty in Bury

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Britains most talented detectives tackle a dangerous arsonist in Bristol, a drug smuggling operation in Manchester, and a family committing shocking animal cruelty in Cheshire

programme.title: Guy Martins WWI Tank
programme.desc: The presenter builds a working replica of a First World War tank to mark the centenary of the Battle of Cambrai, and takes his tank driving test so he can take his creation on to the streets for Lincolns Remembrance Day parade. He also delves into the history of the earliest armoured vehicles, the soldiers who crewed them, and the women who built them

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team takes some of greatest-ever cars featured in James Bond movies for a spin, including the iconic Aston Martin DB5. Freddie Flintoff gets behind the wheel of an Extreme E race car and puts it to the test against a man in a jet-pack, while Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness test a new Ferrari against a very old Alfa

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness head on an icy expedition across the wild Scottish Highlands in the new Land Rover Defender, Mercedes G-Wagen and Ariel Nomad to see which vehicle will prove itself the ultimate off-roader

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers go in search of mothers who love to cook during lazy weekends, and discover the meals they enjoy preparing, including peach paradise pudding, chicken pie, beef stew and a plava cake. The bikers also rustle up banana pancakes with bacon and spiced teacakes and braised steaks, while historian Gerard Baker challenges five people to a ravioli-making contest

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of Turner, one of Britains most loved artists, Rick discovers how much the Cornish landscape influenced his work. At Newlyn Fish Market, he counts in the daily catch with the head auctioneer, who tells him how the market has adapted to modern times, while at Caerhays Castle, home to the nations largest collection of magnolia plants, Rick discovers how this corner of Cornwall was once home to some of the great Victorian plant hunters

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: On the banks of the River Tamar, Rick visits a little-known mausoleum with a rather macabre story and takes to the waves with an inspirational organisation who offer therapy using the power of surfing. On the wild Atlantic coast, near Bedruthan Steps, he meets fellow chef Emily Scott, who recreates the meal she cooked for President Joe Biden during the recent G7 summit

programme.desc: Archie gets trapped in a lift with a pregnant woman and a heavy smoker suffering from emphysema. Michelle takes a shine to Mike, the new agency nurse at the Mill, and discovers he is Archies friend from college

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Linda struggles to gain the teams respect on her first day as clinical-nurse manager, and is mortified when a one-night stand turns up at the hospital with a surprise. Meanwhile, Dylan is apprehensive about returning to work following Pollys death, but a curious case arouses his interest. Starring Christine Tremarco and William Beck

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Eddie Santini is finally summoned to the Old Bailey to stand trial for murder, bringing to a head his bitter confrontation with arch-enemy Rosie Fox. Extended episode of the police drama, starring Michael Higgs and Caroline Catz

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Tanya tells Max shes moved on, shes in love with another man. And, shes engaged

programme.title: Classic EastEnders

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James is none too happy when Siegfried allows Tricky Woo to stay at Skeldale House after Mrs Pumphrey goes away to France. Rural drama, starring Christopher Timothy and Robert Hardy

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: A psychiatric nurse is found murdered at the asylum, but the presence of a patient at the scene holding the weapon and confessing is not enough to convince Blake of his guilt. Meanwhile, at home, the doctor continues to hide his grief about the search for his wife and child in Singapore. Detective drama, starring Craig McLachlan

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: DCI Adams investigations into a spate of domestic robberies result in an accusation of sexual harassment against him from a young nurse. Hetty is convinced he has been wrongly accused and investigates the claim from her hospital bed

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A hurtful remark from Chris sends Tracey on a diet, while Dorien takes a new interest in fitness when she gets a handsome personal trainer

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Day of the Welsh Ferret
programme.desc: Compo has an interesting experience when he loses his ferret as the trio make their way to a friends funeral

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: When the Teesdales stop to give Clegg, Compo and Seymour a lift home from their caravanning holiday, Mrs T tries to fight off a feeling of discomfort as it becomes apparent the trio are determined to help park the caravan in their drive. Peter Sallis stars

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Poor weather plagues Bunty and Mrs McCarthys picnic. Meanwhile, Father Brown must intervene when it appears that a dark spirit has murderous intent

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Tommy urges Frances to go further with her attempts at making Catherines life a misery, and a therapist tries to understand why Catherine attended Tommy Lee Royces mothers funeral. Meanwhile, John begins to sweat when a new body is discovered. Crime drama, starring Sarah Lancashire, James Norton and Siobhan Finneran

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An unknown tagger begins to paint graffiti around London, and claims to have been responsible for killing a celebrated street artist four years previously. Originally part of a gang, the victim went solo after receiving support from a wealthy art patron, and when the detectives reopen the case, they become suspicious of his resentful former crew members. Meanwhile, Brian signs up to a social networking site as TopCop999 to chart the gritty life of a lawman, much to his colleagues displeasure

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: A brewery heiress appears to be the sole witness to the murder of a serial killer - but she was herself presumed dead 19 years previously. Dalziel assumes she is an imposter, until further research uncovers bad blood between the brothers currently running the family business. Detective drama, starring Warren Clarke and Colin Buchanan

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Jack announces he is quitting the team, but before Sandra, Brian and Gerry can question his reasons, shadowy Whitehall figure Stephen Fisher arrives with one of his secret cases - the unsolved murder of a woman dating back more than 160 years. With just 24 hours to solve it, will the sleuths find time to get to the bottom of Jacks shock decision and persuade him to stick around?

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: DCI Adams investigations into a spate of domestic robberies result in an accusation of sexual harassment against him from a young nurse. Hetty is convinced he has been wrongly accused and investigates the claim from her hospital bed

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A hurtful remark from Chris sends Tracey on a diet, while Dorien takes a new interest in fitness when she gets a handsome personal trainer

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: When dancers vanish from Le Coeurs school, Orla and Lola ask Harry to investigate. Harry and Fergus explore the schools past to solve the mystery

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kingdom
programme.desc: A beautiful woman arrives at the Kingdom office asking for help to recover her kidnapped baby, but it transpires the accused is not only her former employer but also the father of the child. Meanwhile, preparations are under way for the annual dyke-leaping championships in Market Shipborough, and a mysterious figure is seen lurking around Simons house. Drama, starring Stephen Fry

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon and Tracey are desperate for a holiday but dont have any money, so they decide to have a bash at winning a karaoke competition. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey is torn between duty to her husband and love for her sister and has to decide whether blood is thicker than water. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon is looking for love - but the object of her affection seems to prefer her sister Tracey. Meanwhile, Doriens latest young hunk becomes involved in an anti-fur protest, which hits the headlines. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: An aristocrat who has fallen on difficult times seeks the roguish dealers help in redeeming a valuable antique he has pawned. Light-hearted drama, guest starring Jack Shepherd, with Ian McShane

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Tinker lectures Lovejoy on the importance of not abusing his ability to gather ill-gotten gains. However, the antiques dealer briefly turns his back on his own ethical standards, only to soon regret his transgression. Ian McShane and Dudley Sutton star

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The antiques dealer attempts to sell dodgy prints to a friend of Lady Jane Felsham - only to learn Eric has procured a bronze statue in a house on a pig farm famously stolen from Her Majesty the Queen. Drama, starring Ian McShane, Dudley Sutton and Phyllis Logan

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Poor weather plagues Bunty and Mrs McCarthys picnic. Meanwhile, Father Brown must intervene when it appears that a dark spirit has murderous intent

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Jack announces he is quitting the team, but before Sandra, Brian and Gerry can question his reasons, shadowy Whitehall figure Stephen Fisher arrives with one of his secret cases - the unsolved murder of a woman dating back more than 160 years. With just 24 hours to solve it, will the sleuths find time to get to the bottom of Jacks shock decision and persuade him to stick around?

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: In their first case without trusty colleague Jack, the team members reinvestigate the disappearance of PE teacher Jason Bowe when the remains of a body are discovered near the elite public boarding school where he taught. Unfortunately, their snooping could not have come at a worse time for the staff, who are preparing to welcome a local MP to open their new computer centre - but what they do glean tells them the dead man seemed very much a loner. However, it soon turns out he got on much better with his students, forming close and inappropriate relationships with several. But could his behaviour have rattled someone enough to kill him? Susannah Harker and Nicola Walker guest star

programme.title: Signora Volpe
programme.desc: Thriller about a British spy-turned-detective who moves to Italy but is followed by trouble wherever she goes. When the police arrest Antonellas friend for the murder of a community leader, Sylvia follows a trail of blackmail, secrets and love to clear her friends name

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The House of Screams, a local scare attraction, becomes the venue for an actual murder when a teenager is found with a sickle through his neck

programme.title: Whitechapel
programme.desc: Part two of two. The hunt is on to find a gang of suspected cannibalistic killers lurking in the sewers before a missing girl becomes the next victim. The station is under attack and the forces of evil are moving against the team on all sides, and as the case takes a dangerously personal twist for Chandler, he must resort to desperate measures. Crime thriller, starring Rupert Penry-Jones, Phil Davis and Steve Pemberton

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.sub-title: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The detective investigates when former war photographer Peter Rooker is found shot dead. It is not long before he uncovers a trail leading from tabloid newspaper baron Eddie Price and editor Melissa Booth to an executed Bosnian family, but when he enlists his wifes help in determining the psychological history behind the murder, a fatal chain of events begins

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: As spring arrives, Nonnatus House welcomes two new nuns, the experienced Sister Hilda and newly qualified Sister Frances, who must acclimatise to the changing East End. A complicated multiple birth tests the skills of some of the midwives to the limit, but Trixie has to face her fears and Valerie deals with a shocking case that arrives unexpectedly

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: To Peggys delight, teenage heartthrobs the Queenmakers are playing Great Slaughter. However, the bands frontman is found dead from an allergic reaction to a bee sting. This is confirmed to be murder by Sister Boniface when she finds the dead bee and Walliss shirt collar smeared with glue and pollen. Gillespie and Livingstone investigate the rivalries among the band, their conniving manager and Walliss pregnant secret wife, who he was planning to divorce

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon and Tracey are desperate for a holiday but dont have any money, so they decide to have a bash at winning a karaoke competition. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.desc: Mattie investigates a robbery with clues reminiscent of her own mothers disappearance - and then Jane finds a body and the case becomes a murder.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor hires a daily to help out around the house, but comes to regret his decision, and a visit to the fish shop unleashes all manner of horrors. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A power cut on a sweltering summer night gives Victor and Margaret time to reflect on their lives together and look forward, without enthusiasm, to a visit from their elderly neighbours. Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Roy Hudd star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Patricks plans for a quiet birthday with Pippa are left in tatters when the Meldrews join them for a meal at a Chinese restaurant. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor Meldrew finds himself forced into early retirement, but is determined not to end up on the scrapheap, pouring scorn on the modern world and driving everybody crazy in the process. Richard Wilson stars in the first-ever episode as misery guts Meldrew, with Annette Crosbie as his long-suffering wife. From 1990

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret tries to take Victors mind off his depressing situation by encouraging him to attend a fitness class and read a book on how to cope with old age. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrew household is disrupted by a pesky plumber whose penchant for morbid practical jokes would try the patience of a saint. Victor decides its time to call a neighbourhood watch system after hes mugged and graffiti is spray painted on the side of the Meldrews house. David Renwicks award-winning comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret are trapped in the shed by a swarm of bees - and not unexpectedly where the mishap-prone Meldrews are concerned, that is just the start of their troubles. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor takes up life drawing classes and Margaret is only too happy to see the back of him - until she learns the subject is a nude woman whom he has volunteered to drive home. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Patricks plans for a quiet birthday with Pippa are left in tatters when the Meldrews join them for a meal at a Chinese restaurant. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets off from Tynemouth on the first leg of a trip to Berwick-upon-Tweed, hearing about of a 19th-century tragedy at sea that inspired 140 local men to set up a coastal rescue service. At Long Sands beach, Michael rolls up his sleeves to help volunteers caring for sick and injured seals at the Tynemouth Aquarium Seal Hospital

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.sub-title: Farne Islands to Berwick upon Tweed
programme.desc: Michael Portillos rail trek along the coast of Northumberland continues towards the Farne Islands, takes in the holy island of Lindisfarne, and finishes in Englands northernmost town, Berwick-upon-Tweed

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: From Britains northernmost station at Thurso in Caithness, Michael Portillo heads for the ferry port of Scrabster to cross the Pentland Firth to the Orkney Islands. Passing the Old Man of Hoy, Michael takes in stunning views of the Orkney archipelago and the rugged coastlines of its 70 islands

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The first of two programmes in which the presenter explores the country that lies at the crossroads between Europe and Asia, and discovers the dramatic changes it is undergoing. The first leg of his journey begins in Istanbul, from which he travels along the Aegean coast to the hostile border with Syria. He meets refugees trying to start a new life and a billionaire taking advantage of a property boom. He moves on into the Taurus Mountains and the Black Sea Coast, and visits a community trying to keep an ancient language alive

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the second half of the journey, Simon travels along the Black Sea Coast to the capital of Ankara and the Northern Highlands, witnessing first hand the aftermath of fighting in Kurdish areas and meeting a conservationist attempting to preserve the regions brown bears. He then returns to Istanbul, where he takes part in a popular TV series set in the palace of the Ottoman Sultans

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels the length of North and South America. The expedition begins at the northernmost point in Alaska, journeying south through Canada to the border with the US. In Denali National Park, he witnesses first hand the impact of climate change on a glacier. He also hunts caribou with native Americans, hears from both sides of the conflict over a controversial oil drilling plan, and discovers Vancouvers opioid addiction crisis

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon reaches the United States, travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In the wide-open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long-term decline in the rural economy, but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land. In a country with the highest incarceration rate in the world, Simons final destination on this leg is a Colorado town that depends almost entirely on 11 prisons. Simon witnesses how inmates are put to work for the state, and how virtual reality is being used to prepare prisoners for life on the outside

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Domestic disharmony ensues for the Meldrews as a routine trip to the garden centre starts a trail of turmoil including a scowling snowman, a laughing policeman and a mysterious saboteur. Christmas edition of David Renwicks comedy from 1994, starring Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Angus Deayton

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victors unease at the possible outcome of a medical test is compounded by the discovery that he has just bought a car with an obscene number plate. However, it isnt until later, when he attends an amateur dramatics rehearsal at neighbour Nick Swaineys house, that things really start getting him down. Richard Wilson stars

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: After years of frustrated anger and railing against the system, Victor Meldrew breathes his last I dont believe it after falling victim to a hit-and-run driver. At first, it seems as if the shock of his death will take a long time to settle for long-suffering Margaret

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: The strategies adopted by plants that enable them to grow in every possible environment, even where there is no sunlight, water or nutrients. Featuring the dragons blood tree, which survives in the desert by converting moisture found in the mist and shading its own roots, the carnivorous Venus flytrap that has evolved into an extraordinary predator able to digest insects, and the cats claw creeper, which uses other plants as a ladder to reach sunlight. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.desc: Simon reaches the United States, travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In the wide-open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long-term decline in the rural economy, but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land. In a country with the highest incarceration rate in the world, Simons final destination on this leg is a Colorado town that depends almost entirely on 11 prisons. Simon witnesses how inmates are put to work for the state, and how virtual reality is being used to prepare prisoners for life on the outside

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Domestic disharmony ensues for the Meldrews as a routine trip to the garden centre starts a trail of turmoil including a scowling snowman, a laughing policeman and a mysterious saboteur. Christmas edition of David Renwicks comedy from 1994, starring Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Angus Deayton

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victors unease at the possible outcome of a medical test is compounded by the discovery that he has just bought a car with an obscene number plate. However, it isnt until later, when he attends an amateur dramatics rehearsal at neighbour Nick Swaineys house, that things really start getting him down. Richard Wilson stars

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor hires a daily to help out around the house, but comes to regret his decision, and a visit to the fish shop unleashes all manner of horrors. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A power cut on a sweltering summer night gives Victor and Margaret time to reflect on their lives together and look forward, without enthusiasm, to a visit from their elderly neighbours. Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Roy Hudd star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor is invited to talk about evolution at the Womens Institute, and finds plenty of inspiration when he decides to take up fishing. Meanwhile, Pippa is left shattered after a three-week visit by Patricks equally stuffy brother. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: The focus turns to apes and monkeys, revealing their similarities to humans. Large armies of hamadryas baboons battle on the plains of Ethiopia to steal females and settle old scores, while Japanese macaques beat the cold by lounging in thermal springs. An orang-utan baby fails in its struggle to make an umbrella out of leaves, and capuchins try to smash nuts with a large rock. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary agrees to see a relationship counsellor, while Tonys efforts to impress Deborahs mother end in disaster. To compound their woes, the duo fear the arrival of Dorothys 10-year-old nephew will ruin their efforts to act maturely. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary realises it is high time he got rid of his moth-eaten, flea-ridden, beer-soaked sofa of 25 years - leading to a trip down memory lane reliving his youth, his first day at work and his meeting with Dorothy. Tony makes an unwise purchase when he buys a snake from a man in the pub

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee wants to create the perfect Christmas for Lucy, so he invites her to spend the holiday in a cosy old country house that used to belong to his dear, dead old aunt - and to make it a proper family get-together, he invites along her parents and dipsy friend Daisy. But the Christmas spirit is in short supply when Lucy discovers that the cottage has not been lived in for years - and it isnt long before they have sensed a spooky presence. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix star in this festive special of the sitcom, with Bobby Ball, Geoffrey Whitehead and Deborah Grant. Festive edition from 2013

programme.title: dinnerladies diaries
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the British sitcom, featuring interviews with the cast as they reminisce about the show on its 20th anniversary

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Marlene spots an opportunity to have her old possessions assessed by experts when the Antiques Roadshow arrives in Ludlow, and the farms staff all share the same idea. However, it turns out that Boycie, with help from Tyler, is the only one to discover a truly valuable item. Fiona Bruce guest stars

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville places an ad in a lonely hearts magazine and finally meets the girl of his dreams. After stretching the truth about being a young executive with a flash sports car, his romance ends before it even begins. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: The staff of Gents and Ladies Ready-to-Wear volunteer to lead the fight against a takeover bid for Grace Brothers department store. Comedy, starring John Inman, Mollie Sugden and Trevor Bannister

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Changing Face of Rural Blamire
programme.desc: Thinking they have to much free time on their hands, the trio decide to find some kind of occupation. They encounter a dodgy bankrupted dealer who persuades them to sell his new product - with disastrous results, particularly for Blamire. Michael Bates, Bill Owen and Peter Sallis star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Wally Batty threatens to leave home, and Compo seizes the opportunity to move in with Nora by dressing smartly and even considering taking a bath to impress her

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Miserly shopkeeper Arkwright organises a sales drive in a bid to boost profits - and rid himself of the vast consignment of apples he has mistakenly ordered. An unhappy Granville is persuaded to demonstrate the merchandise. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Daisy tries to encourage Onslow to notice her by picking up a toyboy in the hope of making him jealous. Meanwhile, Hyacinth forces Elizabeth and Richard to help her organise a social occasion at the church hall. Patricia Routledge and Judy Cornwell star

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: The men of the Walmington-on-Sea Home Guard platoon assume responsibility when a large naval gun is delivered to the church hall - the only problem being that no-one is quite sure how it works. Classic comedy first broadcast in 1969, starring Arthur Lowe, John Le Mesurier and Clive Dunn

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: HQ discover that Mainwaring is not a commissioned officer and he is ordered to join the ranks as a private. Comedy first aired in 1969, starring Arthur Lowe and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: In a bid to impress Lucy, Lee prepares for a 10km fun run, only to injure himself at the start of his training. The aspiring athlete tries to hide the mishap from his flatmate and gets a secret sports massage, which inevitably leads to more trouble. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy attends a three-day trade conference to drum up business, but when she has little luck she resorts to flirting with the male delegates. Lee is outraged with her plan, however, and in an attempt to stop her he turns up at the event - posing as her husband. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes needs someone to look after Grandad so she can treat herself to a much-needed holiday - but with private nursing homes being so expensive, it seems her only option is to convince the health visitor he has lost his marbles. Rory and Dino move in for a couple of weeks, and the matriarch is soon spitting feathers when the latter begins taking over the house, and her late husband gets in touch from beyond the grave with some ominous news. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright tries to make Nurse Gladys Emmanuel jealous and decides to advertises for a live-in housekeeper, but is taken aback when Mrs Featherstone applies for the position

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: After a recent break-up, Alma tries to get her life back on track, but with no job, no qualifications and a rebellious streak a mile wide, it is not going to be easy. Meanwhile, her heroin-addicted mother has been sectioned for arson, and her grandmother Joan wants nothing to do with it. Comedy pilot, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: After the tragic death of his friend Axel Jacklin - Britains finest exponent of acting in high winds - Steven finds himself in demand for dramatic roles such as Napoleonic-era sea captains and mad Shakespearean kings. However, to land these attractive parts, he discovers he must become a Freemason, and asks Ed to help him join the local lodge

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Nurse Gladys Emmanuels washing-machine breaks down, and Arkwright decides to try and lure her into his home with the offer of his vintage machine

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: An Errand Boy by the Ear
programme.desc: Arkwright decides Granville needs toughening up and starts dragging him around the store by his ear, but the regular customers are unhappy by what they see

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville places an ad in a lonely hearts magazine and finally meets the girl of his dreams. After stretching the truth about being a young executive with a flash sports car, his romance ends before it even begins. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville is determined to play Cupid for Madge and Gastric, but he realises he will stand no chance of matchmaking the pair unless the latter improves his image. His plans take an inspired turn, however, when a salesman returns to town. Wet Eric is desperate to convince his wife its going to rain and gets lured into a dangerous purchase, and Granville sets his sights on Old Bentinck, who never goes into the shop, coming up with a cunning way to tempt him in to spend. David Jason, Mark Williams, Tim Healy and Johnny Vegas star

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: The shopkeeping comedy returns with a festive instalment. Granville and Gastric find themselves playing marriage counsellors, while Leroy adopts a festive disguise to avoid relationship trouble of a different kind. Meanwhile, Mrs Featherstone struggles to get into the Christmas spirit and Kath attempts to bring the street together as one harmonious choir of carollers to beat Finkle Street once and for all - but does Granville have a trick up his sleeve to help them out? Starring David Jason, Tim Healy, James Baxter and Stephanie Cole

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville faces being left alone at Christmas as all his friends and neighbours make plans to go away. He is particularly dismayed to see Mavis planning a Christmas break with Madge, and terrified to learn that Mr Newbold is plotting an escape from Mrs Featherstones advances, and leaving Granville entirely at her mercy. To make matters worse, the wily shopkeeper has a consignment of dodgy Christmas crackers to sell and a distinct shortage of customers. David Jason stars in the special festive episode

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to sell bargain spectacles that do nothing for his customers eyesight, while Mr Newbold is inspired to take control of his life by a self-help book and resolves to tell Mrs Featherstone how he really feels about her. Eric tries to persuade Kath to join him on a camping holiday, and Leroy receives a mysterious package

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Almas dream of becoming an actress isnt going to be easy and she needs to find a day job. After unsuccessfully dipping her toe into the world of escorting, she reluctantly takes up a position at a sandwich shop. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike approaches Alison to discuss their finances following the loss of their BandB business. However, his wife is preoccupied with plotting revenge on the ghosts for April Fools Day and recruits a playful Humphrey to execute her plans. Meanwhile, Mike is shocked to find someone from their insurance company on his doorstep - an unannounced visit to check the details of the gatehouse fire. Can Mike convince her that lightning really can strike thrice? Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright attends a former customers funeral, leaving Granville in charge of the store. However, the miserly shopkeeper has difficulty trusting his nephew to run it properly

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: In a bid to impress Lucy, Lee prepares for a 10km fun run, only to injure himself at the start of his training. The aspiring athlete tries to hide the mishap from his flatmate and gets a secret sports massage, which inevitably leads to more trouble. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary realises it is high time he got rid of his moth-eaten, flea-ridden, beer-soaked sofa of 25 years - leading to a trip down memory lane reliving his youth, his first day at work and his meeting with Dorothy. Tony makes an unwise purchase when he buys a snake from a man in the pub

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee wants to create the perfect Christmas for Lucy, so he invites her to spend the holiday in a cosy old country house that used to belong to his dear, dead old aunt - and to make it a proper family get-together, he invites along her parents and dipsy friend Daisy. But the Christmas spirit is in short supply when Lucy discovers that the cottage has not been lived in for years - and it isnt long before they have sensed a spooky presence. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix star in this festive special of the sitcom, with Bobby Ball, Geoffrey Whitehead and Deborah Grant. Festive edition from 2013

programme.title: dinnerladies diaries
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the British sitcom, featuring interviews with the cast as they reminisce about the show on its 20th anniversary

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Marlene spots an opportunity to have her old possessions assessed by experts when the Antiques Roadshow arrives in Ludlow, and the farms staff all share the same idea. However, it turns out that Boycie, with help from Tyler, is the only one to discover a truly valuable item. Fiona Bruce guest stars

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin is overjoyed when Paul announces he is leaving the area as he cannot find suitable premises for his business, but later faces a quandary when he changes upon an available property in the ideal location. Comedy, starring Richard Briers and Peter Egan

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: To celebrate her 40th wedding anniversary, Marlene wants to renew her marriage vows with Boycie, and tries to make contact with old friends while compiling the guest list - only to receive devastating news. Comedy, starring John Challis and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: The staff of Gents and Ladies Ready-to-Wear volunteer to lead the fight against a takeover bid for Grace Brothers department store. Comedy, starring John Inman, Mollie Sugden and Trevor Bannister

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Changing Face of Rural Blamire
programme.desc: Thinking they have to much free time on their hands, the trio decide to find some kind of occupation. They encounter a dodgy bankrupted dealer who persuades them to sell his new product - with disastrous results, particularly for Blamire. Michael Bates, Bill Owen and Peter Sallis star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Wally Batty threatens to leave home, and Compo seizes the opportunity to move in with Nora by dressing smartly and even considering taking a bath to impress her

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin is overjoyed when Paul announces he is leaving the area as he cannot find suitable premises for his business, but later faces a quandary when he changes upon an available property in the ideal location. Comedy, starring Richard Briers and Peter Egan

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Miserly shopkeeper Arkwright organises a sales drive in a bid to boost profits - and rid himself of the vast consignment of apples he has mistakenly ordered. An unhappy Granville is persuaded to demonstrate the merchandise. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Daisy tries to encourage Onslow to notice her by picking up a toyboy in the hope of making him jealous. Meanwhile, Hyacinth forces Elizabeth and Richard to help her organise a social occasion at the church hall. Patricia Routledge and Judy Cornwell star

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: The men of the Walmington-on-Sea Home Guard platoon assume responsibility when a large naval gun is delivered to the church hall - the only problem being that no-one is quite sure how it works. Classic comedy first broadcast in 1969, starring Arthur Lowe, John Le Mesurier and Clive Dunn

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: HQ discover that Mainwaring is not a commissioned officer and he is ordered to join the ranks as a private. Sergeant Wilson is put in temporary charge, but his lack of leadership skills during a training exercise leaves the platoon yearning for the captains reinstatement. Comedy first aired in 1969, starring Arthur Lowe and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Still Open All Hours

Madge is convinced that her house is haunted and is refusing to sleep in her bedroom, but luckily Granville discovers Gastric has a hidden dark side with spiritual powers that could solve the mystery and impress Madge. Meanwhile, Mrs Hussein takes a shine to Leroy and wants to know what they keep behind the counter for special customers

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy attends a three-day trade conference to drum up business, but when she has little luck she resorts to flirting with the male delegates. Lee is outraged with her plan, however, and in an attempt to stop her he turns up at the event - posing as her husband. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes needs someone to look after Grandad so she can treat herself to a much-needed holiday - but with private nursing homes being so expensive, it seems her only option is to convince the health visitor he has lost his marbles. Rory and Dino move in for a couple of weeks, and the matriarch is soon spitting feathers when the latter begins taking over the house, and her late husband gets in touch from beyond the grave with some ominous news. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.desc: After a recent break-up, Alma tries to get her life back on track, but with no job, no qualifications and a rebellious streak a mile wide, it is not going to be easy. Meanwhile, her heroin-addicted mother has been sectioned for arson, and her grandmother Joan wants nothing to do with it. Comedy pilot, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: After the tragic death of his friend Axel Jacklin - Britains finest exponent of acting in high winds - Steven finds himself in demand for dramatic roles such as Napoleonic-era sea captains and mad Shakespearean kings. However, to land these attractive parts, he discovers he must become a Freemason, and asks Ed to help him join the local lodge

programme.title: Open All Hours

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville is determined to play Cupid for Madge and Gastric, but he realises he will stand no chance of matchmaking the pair unless the latter improves his image. His plans take an inspired turn, however, when a salesman returns to town. Wet Eric is desperate to convince his wife its going to rain and gets lured into a dangerous purchase, and Granville sets his sights on Old Bentinck, who never goes into the shop, coming up with a cunning way to tempt him in to spend. David Jason, Mark Williams, Tim Healy and Johnny Vegas star

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: The shopkeeping comedy returns with a festive instalment. Granville and Gastric find themselves playing marriage counsellors, while Leroy adopts a festive disguise to avoid relationship trouble of a different kind. Meanwhile, Mrs Featherstone struggles to get into the Christmas spirit and Kath attempts to bring the street together as one harmonious choir of carollers to beat Finkle Street once and for all - but does Granville have a trick up his sleeve to help them out? Starring David Jason, Tim Healy, James Baxter and Stephanie Cole

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville faces being left alone at Christmas as all his friends and neighbours make plans to go away. He is particularly dismayed to see Mavis planning a Christmas break with Madge, and terrified to learn that Mr Newbold is plotting an escape from Mrs Featherstones advances, and leaving Granville entirely at her mercy. To make matters worse, the wily shopkeeper has a consignment of dodgy Christmas crackers to sell and a distinct shortage of customers. David Jason stars in the special festive episode

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville tries to sell bargain spectacles that do nothing for his customers eyesight, while Mr Newbold is inspired to take control of his life by a self-help book and resolves to tell Mrs Featherstone how he really feels about her. Eric tries to persuade Kath to join him on a camping holiday, and Leroy receives a mysterious package

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville creates a special blend of snuff, but will his customers notice any beneficial effects? The ladies get dressed up for line-dancing, while Gastric is prompted to go on a diet. A furtive Mr Newbold thinks hes found a pastime to share with Mrs Rossi - away from the prying eyes of Mrs Featherstone. However, a determined Black Widow enlists assistance from Granville and Leroy for a crash-course in how to ride a bicycle. David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Maggie Ollerenshaw star

programme.desc: Arkwright tries to make Nurse Gladys Emmanuel jealous and decides to advertises for a live-in housekeeper, but is taken aback when Mrs Featherstone applies for the position

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: David Jason returns as Granville in this follow-up to Roy Clarkes popular comedy Open All Hours, as he re-opens the doors of the nations favourite corner shop. In the opening episode, Arkwrights protege finds an old mangle in the yard - and wonders how he can best put it to use. Meanwhile, Beth continues to pressure Leroy to find a date for her best friend, Ruby, who has been suspended at work. Elsewhere, Eric and Cyril tutor Mr Newbold in the art of romance - and how to get closer to Mrs Rossi. Co-starring James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Katie Redford

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: A squeak on Granvilles bike interferes with his hopes of romance, and Arkwright worries about a mysterious visitor to a house in Atkinson Terrace

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Nessa goes into labour a month early in Barry, and the newlyweds must forget their differences to track down Smithy in time for the birth of his child. Meanwhile, Stacey returns to Essex to salvage her marriage

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. Nessa has taken up residence in Daves caravan in Sully and is getting ready for Neils christening. The event means a big reunion for the gang, at which Smithy receives surprising news from Nessa, and Stacey has a special request for her husband

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Zak treats a 90-year-old woman after paramedics gave her CPR, Tristan gets a diagnosis spot-on, and Christine has a patient with an alarming combination of symptoms

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Stacey and the team help the Clark family declutter as they lay out their belongings in a warehouse only to discover they own 521 odd socks, 75 barbies and 28 games controllers. After moving from the US to a much smaller house in the UK the family no longer have the space they need. Carpenter Rob creates some floor to ceiling storage for the family while Dilly reorganises the kitchen and laundry area

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Louis spends time with the global pop star Rita Ora. Louis meets Rita at her dads pub in West London where they sit down for a revealing conversation that takes in her rise to stardom, her familys arrival in the UK in 1990, and the difficulties she has faced dealing with intense press scrutiny and speculation about her personal life. Later, Louis spends time with Rita on the set of her latest music video in LA, before joining her as she puts on a spectacular live performance in Albania

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Flower, the first dog ever to take a dislike to him . He also helps Heidi and Marvin, both facing serious medical challenges

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Since his wife died shortly after giving birth to their sixth child, Paul Makings has been valiantly holding the family together as they grieve. But hes facing even more problems - living in a two-bedroom house he has started to extend, and forced to sleep on the sofa. Nick Knowles and the team are joined by more than 100 locals in Misterton, Nottinghamshire, as they take on their biggest home build ever. However, they have to battle against a blizzard to complete the job in nine days

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of Manchester couple Rebecca and Steve, whose life was changed for ever when they found out they were expecting triplets. Two years on, Rebecca is becoming depressed by the state of their small, damp, dilapidated house, which is unsafe for the children. The builders have just nine days to bring the property up to date and give this tired mum and dad the space they need for their active offspring. Luckily, local tradespeople and other members of the community turn out in force to help

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family. The eight-year-old was born with quadriplegic cerebral palsy and her home needs to be made more wheelchair-friendly. Enter the DIY SOS builders, who set to work on designer Gabrielle Blackmans vision, although with just nine days to complete the task, theyll need help. Luckily, the local tradespeople are also out in force, giving their time and their skills for free

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pioneering veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick uses his talents to treat a puppy called Poppy, which has difficulties with walking, and a lurcher called Dylan needs help with a collapsed joint. The programme also features a one-year-old cat that was hit by a car on its first venture outside the house, leaving it requiring emergency treatment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick and his team treat Staffordshire bull terrier Lulu, who has been hit by a car and had her pelvis smashed into more than 25 pieces. The professors only option is to pin the larger pieces back together in an operation that will require all his expertise. Noel and his team also treat a giant schnauzer called Florence who has a sore knee and a pointy-eared Jack Russell called Muffin who has a mysterious problem with her back legs

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team come to the aid of Manchester couple Rebecca and Steve, whose life was changed for ever when they found out they were expecting triplets. Two years on, Rebecca is becoming depressed by the state of their small, damp, dilapidated house, which is unsafe for the children. The builders have just nine days to bring the property up to date and give this tired mum and dad the space they need for their active offspring. Luckily, local tradespeople and other members of the community turn out in force to help

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The teams stand by for casualties as police launch an armed raid on the home of a wanted man. In Bradford a minibus carrying children with special needs is in collision with a stolen car

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing and TOWIE star Pete Wicks immerses himself in the heart-warming and emotional world of dog care at Basildons Dogs Trust rehoming centre. Its Petes first day at Dogs Trust, and he meets a pug facing a worrying surgery and pregnant dog who was seized at the border

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets a litter of puppies who were found abandoned in a crisp box, and helps the staff fight to keep them alive

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Bryn is in his element as he awaits the arrival of the Essex boys, who are having a big night out in Cardiff and staying for a sleepover, but Smithy is concerned about seeing Nessa again after their last meeting. Meanwhile, Stacey tells Gavin about a worrying discovery, and Pam and Mick discuss their plans for a new conservatory

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Leslie Phillips and Olympic curling champion Rhona Martin guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky characters. Among other highlights, Nan visits an old friend in hospital and Lauren takes a job in a burger bar

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessas plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Bryn is in his element as he awaits the arrival of the Essex boys, who are having a big night out in Cardiff and staying for a sleepover, but Smithy is concerned about seeing Nessa again after their last meeting. Meanwhile, Stacey tells Gavin about a worrying discovery, and Pam and Mick discuss their plans for a new conservatory

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics help a man suffering from anxiety who discovered he might have been exposed to HIV. Crews attend to a man found unconscious in the stairwell of a block of flats

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Bigger Build Ireland
programme.desc: Baz and the team come to the aid of former firefighter Pa Berry, who suffered extensive injuries in the line of duty and is in need of help in completing his home renovation

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A teenage schoolgirl is reported missing and the girls mother reveals her daughter was upset by the death of her father and moving to London from Manchester with a new stepfather. Her only friend discloses the girl has recently been seen with bruises. Millie and Leon discover the childs estranged grandmother has followed her brood to London and has been in contact with her granddaughter. Guest starring Rachel Davies

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part one of two. Having been offered a job by the Child Exploitation Unit, Sam is keen to leave Sun Hill on a high and the opportunity arises when an old informant discloses details of a drugs shipment involving a restaurateur and two brothers who run an airfreight company. However, the sting goes badly wrong when the informant is kneecapped and the restaurant owners daughter is kidnapped

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Conclusion. Inquiries reveal that the brothers running the airfreight company kidnapped restaurant owner Maloud Senacs daughter because he had not paid them for the drugs. The race is on to find the missing girl before it is too late and Sam ends her stint at Sun Hill with a successful result when all the suspects are brought in for questioning. Lisa Maxwell stars

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jacks estranged son Ben is released from prison and Mickey is shocked to discover he is still involved in the drugs scene when his girlfriend is found unconscious outside a known drug den rented in her name. Attempts to keep the situation secret from Jack come to nothing when he turns up unexpectedly to watch a sting operation and is forced to arrest his own son

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jack finds it hard to believe witness reports that his son kept faith with the police and was not responsible for firing the fatal shot when the drug deal was ambushed. After an emotional reconciliation, Ben agrees to take part in a second sting to ransom his girlfriend, who has been kidnapped by the drugs gang

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: In the first of a six-part story centring on two brothers, a man is badly beaten in a street fight outside the busy E1 bar. Smithy and Callum break up the skirmish and encounter bar owner Jason Devlin, who reveals a vicious streak and manages to rile the officers with his smug air of self-confidence. They entertain doubts about his innocence but are intrigued when he implicates his own brother in the disturbance - without acknowledging the relationship

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two of six. The fire at the E1 bar reveals the fact that the Devlins had many enemies, and Smithy starts to take their arrogance personally. Investigators find cocaine and forged identity documents in the debris of the barmans flat, but he insists he knew nothing about either, even when Callum threatens to tell his boss he has been cheating on him with his girlfriend

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The response teams rush to save the life of a 21-year-old man who has been shot twice in the chest at a pub in Doncaster. Another man has a seizure high up in the cab of his tipper truck

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A doctor on his way home from work is left fighting for his life after a head-on collision with a truck. Leeds paramedic Chris is called to a motorcyclist who has been hit by a taxi

programme.desc: Nessa goes into labour a month early in Barry, and the newlyweds must forget their differences to track down Smithy in time for the birth of his child. Meanwhile, Stacey returns to Essex to salvage her marriage

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. Nessa has taken up residence in Daves caravan in Sully and is getting ready for Neils christening. programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessas plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Lauren receives a proposal, and Bernies sisters make an appearance, while Derek Faye meets Bonnie Langford, guest starring as herself

programme.title: Death at the Mansion: Rebecca Zahau
programme.desc: Experts take a closer look at who Rebecca was as they try to figure out whether the crime scene was staged to look like a suicide

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Jools Holland and pop band the Divine Comedy guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky and bizarre characters. Lauren fights with Kelly over Ryan, and 1950s landlady Ma Willow makes her first appearance

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Lauren receives a proposal, and Bernies sisters make an appearance, while Derek Faye meets Bonnie Langford, guest starring as herself

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Italian Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr join forces to renovate the last two rooms. Their dream of creating an open plan living and dining room is dented when they discover the main structural wall dividing the two spaces requires a much smaller arch than they anticipated. For this final space, they agree to put their design differences to one side, but a disagreement over the shape of the arch threatens to divide them. Away from the task, the duo take a boat trip along the stunning Zingaro nature reserve to get inspiration from the Sicilian landscape, and enjoy sunset on horseback in the ancient Greek city of Selinunte

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis interviews some of the biggest names in UK entertainment and is granted exclusive access into their lives at home and at work, beginning with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south-west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life; from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, and the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Stacey and the team help the Clark family declutter as they lay out their belongings in a warehouse only to discover they own 521 odd socks, 75 barbies and 28 games controllers. After moving from the US to a much smaller house in the UK the family no longer have the space they need. Carpenter Rob creates some floor to ceiling storage for the family while Dilly reorganises the kitchen and laundry area

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Louis spends time with the global pop star Rita Ora. Louis meets Rita at her dads pub in West London where they sit down for a revealing conversation that takes in her rise to stardom, her familys arrival in the UK in 1990, and the difficulties she has faced dealing with intense press scrutiny and speculation about her personal life. Later, Louis spends time with Rita on the set of her latest music video in LA, before joining her as she puts on a spectacular live performance in Albania

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Flower, the first dog ever to take a dislike to him . He also helps Heidi and Marvin, both facing serious medical challenges

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Since his wife died shortly after giving birth to their sixth child, Paul Makings has been valiantly holding the family together as they grieve. But hes facing even more problems - living in a two-bedroom house he has started to extend, and forced to sleep on the sofa. Nick Knowles and the team are joined by more than 100 locals in Misterton, Nottinghamshire, as they take on their biggest home build ever. However, they have to battle against a blizzard to complete the job in nine days

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles is in Spalding, Lincolnshire, to meet Dakota Read and her family. The eight-year-old was born with quadriplegic cerebral palsy and her home needs to be made more wheelchair-friendly. Enter the DIY SOS builders, who set to work on designer Gabrielle Blackmans vision, although with just nine days to complete the task, theyll need help. Luckily, the local tradespeople are also out in force, giving their time and their skills for free

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pioneering veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick uses his talents to treat a puppy called Poppy, which has difficulties with walking, and a lurcher called Dylan needs help with a collapsed joint. The programme also features a one-year-old cat that was hit by a car on its first venture outside the house, leaving it requiring emergency treatment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick and his team treat Staffordshire bull terrier Lulu, who has been hit by a car and had her pelvis smashed into more than 25 pieces. The professors only option is to pin the larger pieces back together in an operation that will require all his expertise. Noel and his team also treat a giant schnauzer called Florence who has a sore knee and a pointy-eared Jack Russell called Muffin who has a mysterious problem with her back legs

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.desc: Stacey challenges members of the Paine family to declutter their home in seven days. In order to do this, they have to let go of half their possessions so that they can then reorganise their property. There are emotional moments as single mother Steph and her three daughters go through their most treasured items, and make some difficult decisions about what to let go of from their past. The items they do decide to let go of will be put into piles to recycle, donate or sell. Plus, tidying and upcycling tips from carpenter Robert Bent, organiser Dilly Carter and cleaner Iwan Carrington

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Italian Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr join forces to renovate the last two rooms. Their dream of creating an open plan living and dining room is dented when they discover the main structural wall dividing the two spaces requires a much smaller arch than they anticipated. For this final space, they agree to put their design differences to one side, but a disagreement over the shape of the arch threatens to divide them. Away from the task, the duo take a boat trip along the stunning Zingaro nature reserve to get inspiration from the Sicilian landscape, and enjoy sunset on horseback in the ancient Greek city of Selinunte

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis interviews some of the biggest names in UK entertainment and is granted exclusive access into their lives at home and at work, beginning with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south-west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life; from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, and the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: A guide to plants that thrive in human-dominated environments, including trees that grow across canyons in India, which have developed into living bridges. The programme examines the origins of growing crops and the ongoing influence on the world of wild plants, as well as efforts to preserve species, from snipers firing pesticide bullets from helicopters to fend off invasive plants to plants being painstakingly pollinated using a paintbrush

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: British car enthusiasts Will and Gus take on a Mazda MX-5 thats been given some real boy racer attitude, hoping to return it to its former glory

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien arrive in York, where Henry struggles to squeeze into some motorcycle leathers and Simon gets into deep water when he tries to restore an aluminium boat

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Force 11 storms are expected in Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, meaning the fishing fleet is safely in harbour with just two boats out at sea. Ocean Ventures skipper John D Buchan is prepared to prove a point to his father and sail to the coast of Norway. Meanwhile, 30 miles off the Shetlands, Charlie and Charles McBride brave the weather to repay their debts

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Father-and-son Charlie and Charles McBride have a disastrous week as they lose their fishing net and their boats hydraulic power is reduced. Jimmy Buchanan has worries of his own when he learns his engine will cost £70,000 to repair. Meanwhile, Chaz Bruce, the youngest skipper in Fraserburghs prawn fleet, braves force eight gales

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo experiences first-hand Italys need for speed in a state-of-the-art Maserati sports car, and discovers how the leaning tower of Pisa was rescued from near collapse. In Carrara, he finds out how the marble used by Michelangelo is still being quarried and is invited to chip away at a contemporary sculpture. Moving on to Bologna, the former politician embarks on a doomed search for spaghetti bolognese before being taught how to prepare a tagliatelle al ragu. Finally, he lets the wind rush through his hair on a high-speed boat trip across Lake Garda

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley investigates how George IIIs mental illness changed Britain, uncovering royal papers and exploring how the attempt on the kings life by a mentally ill subject transformed psychiatry forever

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team think they can smell profit by choosing one of the simplest cars ever built, the VW Beetle

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team opt to buy one of the most affordable sports cars on the road - the Mazda MX-5

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The Allied offensive in the Pacific, where Americas two-pronged attack led to heavy casualties on both sides, as the Japanese mounted a ferocious defence. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.sub-title: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
programme.desc: Rob Bell explores the coastal defence network built to defend Britains beaches, including a tower in Essex which controlled mines laid across the estuary

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
